abilities.name: DEATHBRINGER STANCE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Periodically, Aatrox's next basic attack deals bonus physical damage and heals him, based on the target's max health.

abilities.name: THE DARKIN BLADE
abilities.desc: Aatrox slams his greatsword down, dealing physical damage. He can swing three times, each with a different area of effect.

abilities.name: INFERNAL CHAINS
abilities.desc: Aatrox smashes the ground, dealing damage to the first enemy hit. Champions and large monsters have to leave the impact area quickly or they will be dragged to the center and take the damage again.

abilities.name: UMBRAL DASH
abilities.desc: Passively, Aatrox heals when damaging enemy champions. On activation, he dashes in a direction.

abilities.name: WORLD ENDER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Aatrox unleashes his demonic form, fearing nearby enemy minions and gaining attack damage, increased healing, and Move Speed. If he gets a takedown, this effect is extended.

abilities.name: Essence Theft
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Whenever Ahri hits a target with a spell, she gains a stack of Essence Theft. When she has enough stacks, her next spell that hits an enemy also heals her.

abilities.name: Orb of Deception
abilities.desc: Ahri sends out and pulls back her orb, dealing magic damage on the way out and true damage on the way back.

abilities.name: Fox-Fire
abilities.desc: Ahri gains a brief burst of movement speed and releases three fox-fires, that lock onto and attack nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Charm
abilities.desc: Ahri blows a kiss that damages and charms an enemy it encounters, instantly stopping movement abilities and causing them to walk harmlessly towards her. The target temporarily takes increased damage from Ahri.

abilities.name: Spirit Rush
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ahri dashes forward and fires essence bolts, damaging nearby enemies. Spirit Rush can be cast up to three times before going on cooldown.

abilities.name: ASSASSIN'S MARK
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Dealing spell damage to a champion creates a ring of energy around them. Exiting that ring empowers Akali's next autoattack with bonus range and damage.

abilities.name: FIVE POINT STRIKE
abilities.desc: Akali throws out five kunai, dealing damage based on her bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power and slowing at maximum range.

abilities.name: TWILIGHT SHROUD
abilities.desc: Akali drops a cover of smoke and briefly gains Movement Speed and restores Energy. While inside the shroud, Akali becomes invisible. Attacking or using abilities will briefly reveal her.

abilities.name: SHURIKEN FLIP
abilities.desc: Akali flips backward and fires a shuriken forward, dealing magic damage. The first enemy or smoke cloud hit is marked. Re-casting dashes to the marked target, dealing additional damage.

abilities.name: PERFECT EXECUTION
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Akali leaps in a direction, damaging enemies she strikes. Re-casting dashes in a direction, executing all enemies she strikes.

abilities.name: DIRTY FIGHTING
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every third attack or ability hit deals bonus physical damages. Against champions, also gains damage shield for brief moment.

abilities.name: AVENGERANG
abilities.desc: Like a typical boomerang spell, can hit each enemy twice (once on way out and in). Boomerang will reach some units beyond the last target hit, if it hits a different target during this it’s range will extend (theoretically range is infinite)

abilities.name: GOING ROGUE
abilities.desc: Passive: Enemies that kill Akshan’s allies become Scoundrels for few brief seconds. Killing a Scoundrel grants Akshan bonus golds and reduces the fallen ally’s death timer. Active: Gain camouflage for a few seconds. Duration is refreshed when Akshan is near a wall or in brush. Gains movement speed when moving toward Scoundrels.

abilities.name: HEROIC SWING
abilities.desc: Akshan fires a rope that attaches to a wall for a few seconds to allow him to swing in a circle. While swinging, Akshan shoots an enemy he has recently damaged.

abilities.name: COMEUPPANCE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Locks onto an enemy champion and begins overcharging Mist shots over a few seconds.

abilities.name: Triumphant Roar
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Alistar charges his roar by stunning or displacing enemy champions or when nearby enemies die. When fully charged he heals himself all nearby allied champions.

abilities.name: Pulverize
abilities.desc: Alistar smashes the ground, dealing damage to nearby enemies and tossing them into the air.

abilities.name: Headbutt
abilities.desc: Alistar rams a target with his head, dealing damage and knocking the target back. May also target turrets to deal bonus damage.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.desc: Alistar tramples nearby enemy units, ignoring unit collision and gaining stacks if he damages an enemy champion. At full stacks Alistar's next basic attack against an enemy champion deals additional magic damage and stuns them.

abilities.name: Unbreakable Will
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Alistar lets out a wild roar, removing all crowd control effects on himself, and reducing incoming physical and magical damage for the duration.

abilities.name: DRAKEHOUND'S STEP
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Entering an attack or movement command while casting an ability will cause Ambessa to dash a short distance once the ability is cast, granting her next attack bonus range, damage, and attack speed, and refunding energy.

abilities.name: CUNNING SWEEP / SUNDERING SLAM
abilities.desc: Ambessa sweeps her twin drakehounds in a semicircle in front of her, dealing bonus damage to enemies hit by the blades. Striking an enemy will transform the next cast of this ability for a short period of time, causing her to slam her twin drakehounds down in a line in front of her, dealing bonus damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: REPUDIATION
abilities.desc: Ambessa gains a shield, briefly braces herself, and then slams the ground to damage nearby enemies. If she blocked any non-minion damage while bracing herself, this ability will deal increased damage.

abilities.name: LACERATE
abilities.desc: Ambessa whips her twin drakehounds around herself, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Initiating Drakehound's Step from this ability causes her to strike a second time at the end of its dash.

abilities.name: PUBLIC EXECUTION
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ambessa blinks to the farthest enemy champion in a line of her choosing and suppresses them upon her arrival. She then slams the enemy into the ground where they take damage and are stunned.

abilities.name: Cursed Touch
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Amumu's basic attacks Curse his enemies, causing them to take bonus true damage from incoming magic damage.

abilities.name: Bandage Toss
abilities.desc: Amumu tosses a sticky bandage at a target, stunning and damaging the target while he pulls himself to them.

abilities.name: Despair
abilities.desc: Overcome by anguish, nearby enemies lose a percentage of their maximum Health each second and have their Curses refreshed.

abilities.name: Tantrum
abilities.desc: Permanently reduces the physical damage Amumu would take. Amumu can unleash his rage, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced by 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units in bandages, applying his Curse, damaging them and rendering them unable to attack or move.

abilities.name: Pyromania
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After casting 4 spells, Annie's next offensive spell will stun the target.

abilities.name: Disintegrate
abilities.desc: Annie hurls a Mana infused fireball, dealing damage in a small area and refunding the Mana cost and half its cooldown if it destroys the target.

abilities.name: Incinerate
abilities.desc: Annie casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing damage to all enemies in the area.

abilities.name: Molten Shield
abilities.desc: Annie casts a shield over herself and Tibbers and gains move speed.

abilities.name: Summon: Tibbers
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Annie summons Tibbers, dealing damage in the area. Tibbers enrages after pouncing on an enemy or when Annie dies, gaining move and attack speed. Recast: Annie orders Tibbers to pounce on a target. He deals damage and knocks up the target when he lands.

abilities.name: Frost Shot
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Ashe's attacks slow their target, causing her to deal increased damage to these targets. Ashe's critical strikes deal no bonus damage but apply an empowered slow to the target.

abilities.name: Ranger's Focus
abilities.desc: Ashe builds up Focus by attacking. At maximum Focus, Ashe can cast Ranger's Focus to consume all stacks of Focus, temporarily increasing her Attack Speed and transforming her basic attack into a powerful flurry attack for the duration.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.desc: Ashe fires 9 arrows in a cone for increased damage. Also applies Frost Shot.

abilities.name: Hawkshot
abilities.desc: Ashe sends her Hawk Spirit on a scouting mission anywhere on the map.

abilities.name: Enchanted Crystal Arrow
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ashe fires a missile of ice which she can steer in the air. If the arrow collides with an enemy Champion, it deals damage and stuns the Champion, stunning for longer the farther arrow has traveled. In addition, surrounding enemy units take damage and are slowed.

abilities.name: COSMIC CREATOR
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Aurelion Sol's damaging abilities break down enemies into permanent stacks of Stardust, which improve each of his abilities.

abilities.name: BREATH OF LIGHT
abilities.desc: Aurelion Sol channels his dragon breath to exhale a beam of starfire, revealing and damaging the first enemy hit and splashing reduced damage onto nearby enemies. Each second the breath is channeled directly at an enemy will deal bonus damage, which is improved by the amount of Stardust that's been collected. This ability collects Stardust if the target is a champion. Aurelion Sol can move while channeling Breath of Light.

abilities.name: ASTRAL FLIGHT
abilities.desc: Aurelion Sol flies over terrain in a targeted direction. While in this state, he can cast other abilities. Breath of Light no longer has a cooldown or maximum channel duration and deals increased damage while flying. Astral Flight's remaining cooldown is reduced whenever an enemy champion dies after being recently damaged by Aurelion Sol. Stardust increases Astral Flight's maximum range.

abilities.name: SINGULARITY
abilities.desc: Aurelion Sol summons a black hole, damaging enemies and slowly pulling them toward its center. This ability grants Stardust each time an enemy dies within the black hole and for each second an enemy champion is caught inside it. The center of the black hole executes enemies who are below a certain percentage of their maximum health. Stardust increases Singularity's area as well as the execution threshold.

abilities.name: FALLING STAR / THE SKIES DESCEND
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Falling Star: Aurelion Sol calls down a star. The impact deals magic damage and stuns enemies hit while also granting Stardust for each enemy champion hit. Gathering enough Stardust transforms Aurelion Sol's next ult cast into The Skies Descend. The Skies Descend: Aurelion Sol calls a giant star down from the heavens with an increased impact zone and increased damage, knocking up enemies rather than stunning them. A shockwave then spreads from the edge of the impact zone, which damages and slows the enemies it hits.

abilities.name: SPIRIT ABJURATION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Aurora's spells and attacks exorcise spirits from the enemies she damages. Exorcised spirits follow Aurora around and heal her.

abilities.name: TWOFOLD HEX
abilities.desc: Aurora sends out a missile that curses any enemies it hits. She can then recast the ability to draw active curses back toward herself, damaging foes who are hit along the way.

abilities.name: ACROSS THE VEIL
abilities.desc: Aurora leaps in a direction of her choosing, entering the spirit realm upon landing, becoming invisible, and gaining Move Speed for a short duration of time. Taking down an enemy champion resets this ability's cooldown.

abilities.name: THE WEIRDING
abilities.desc: Aurora converges the realms, sending out a blast of spirit magic that damages and slows enemies before Aurora hops backward to safety.

abilities.name: BETWEEN WORLDS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Aurora leaps in a direction of her choosing, releasing a shockwave that damages and slows any enemies it hits. Afterward, she creates an area that slows enemies within it and allows Aurora to teleport from one side of the area to the other.

abilities.name: TRAVELER’S CALL
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Bard attracts and collects Chimes, granting him XP, Mana, and out-of-combat Move Speed. Every collected Chime buffs Bard’s Meeps. Bard summons Meeps regularly, assisting with his basic attacks and dealing extra magic damage. When Bard has collected enough Chimes, his meeps will also deal damage in an area and slow enemies hit.

abilities.name: COSMIC BINDING
abilities.desc: Bard fires a missile which will damage and slow the first enemy struck, and continue onward. If it strikes a wall, it will stun the initial target; if it strikes another enemy, it will stun them both.

abilities.name: CARETAKER’S SHRINE
abilities.desc: Bard conjures a Health shrine at a target location, granting the first ally champion to enter Move Speed, AP, and Health. The shrine continues growing for a short while, powering up its healing value.

abilities.name: MAGICAL JOURNEY
abilities.desc: Bard opens a portal in nearby terrain. Ally and enemy champions alike can take a one-way trip through that terrain by moving into the portal.

abilities.name: TEMPERED FATE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Bard sends spirit energy arcing to a location, putting all champions, minions, monsters, and turrets hit into stasis for a brief time, as well as stunning them. Enemies hit are revealed for the duration.

abilities.name: Mana Barrier
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Blitzcrank gains a shield based on his mana when dropping to low health.

abilities.name: Rocket Grab
abilities.desc: Blitzcrank fires his right hand to grab an opponent on its path, dealing damage and dragging it back to him.

abilities.name: Overdrive
abilities.desc: Blitzcrank super charges himself to get dramatically increased Movement and Attack Speed. He is temporarily slowed after the effect ends.

abilities.name: Power Fist
abilities.desc: Blitzcrank charges up his fist to make his next attack critically strike and pop his target up in the air.

abilities.name: Static Field
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Enemies attacked by Blitzcrank are marked and take lightning damage after 1 second. Additionally, Blitzcrank can activate this ability to damage nearby enemies, and silence them briefly.

abilities.name: BLAZE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Brand's spells light his targets ablaze, dealing damage over 1 seconds, stacking up to 2 times. If Brand kills an enemy while it is ablaze he regains mana. When Blaze reaches max stacks on a Champion or large monster, it becomes unstable. It detonates in 3 seconds, applying spell effects and dealing massive damage in an area around the victim.

abilities.name: SEAR
abilities.desc: Launches a projectile that stops on the first enemy hit, dealing damage and applying a stack of Brand’s passive. If the target was previously afflicted by Brand’s passive they are also briefly stunned.

abilities.name: PILLAR OF FLAME
abilities.desc: After a short delay, Brand creates a Pillar of Flame at a target area, dealing magic damage to enemy units within the area.

abilities.name: CONFLAGRATION
abilities.desc: Brand conjures a powerful blast at his target that spreads to nearby enemies, dealing magic damage. If the target is ablaze, Conflagration's spread is doubled.

abilities.name: PYROCLASM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Launches a projectile that travels to the target, dealing damage and applying a stack of Brand’s passive. The projectile will then bounce to a nearby target. Does not damage Brand.

abilities.name: Concussive Blows
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Braum's basic attacks apply Concussive Blows. Once the first stack is applied, ally basic attacks also stack Concussive Blows. Upon reaching 4 stacks, the target is stunned and takes magic damage. For the next few seconds they cannot receive new stacks, but take bonus magic damage from Braum's attacks.

abilities.name: Winter's Bite
abilities.desc: Braum propels freezing ice from his shield, slowing and dealing magic damage. Applies a stack of Concussive Blows.

abilities.name: Stand Behind Me
abilities.desc: Braum leaps to a target allied champion or minion. On arrival, Braum and the ally gain Armor and Magic Resist for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Unbreakable
abilities.desc: Braum raises his shield in a direction for several seconds, intercepting all projectiles causing them to hit him and be destroyed. He negates the damage of the first attack completely and reduces the damage of all subsequent attacks from this direction.

abilities.name: Glacial Fissure
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Braum slams the ground, knocking up enemies nearby and in a line in front of him. A fissure is left along the line that slows enemies.

abilities.name: HEADSHOT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every few basic attacks, or against a target she has trapped or netted, Caitlyn will fire a headshot dealing bonus damage that scales with her critical strike chance. On trapped or netted targets, Caitlyn's Headshot attack range is doubled.

abilities.name: PILTOVER PEACEMAKER
abilities.desc: Caitlyn revs up her rifle for 1 second to unleash a penetrating shot that deals physical damage (deals less damage to subsequent targets).

abilities.name: YORDLE SNAP TRAP
abilities.desc: Caitlyn sets a trap to find sneaky yordles. When sprung, the trap reveals and immobilizes the enemy champion for brief period, granting Caitlyn an empowered Headshot.

abilities.name: 90 CALIBER NET
abilities.desc: Caitlyn fires a heavy net to slow her target. The recoil knocks Caitlyn back.

abilities.name: ACE IN THE HOLE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Caitlyn takes time to line up the perfect shot, dealing massive damage to a single target at a huge range. Enemy champions can intercept the bullet for their ally.

abilities.name: Adaptive Defenses
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Basic attacks on champions grant a shield equal to 20% of Camille's maximum health against their damage type (Physical or Magic) for a brief duration.

abilities.name: Precision Protocol
abilities.desc: Camille's next attack deals bonus damage and grants bonus movement speed. This spell can be recast for a short period of time, doing significantly increased bonus damage if Camille delays a period of time between the two attacks.

abilities.name: Tactical Sweep
abilities.desc: Camille blasts in a cone after a delay, dealing damage. Enemies in the outer half are slowed and take extra damage, while also healing Camille.

abilities.name: Hookshot
abilities.desc: Camille pulls herself to a wall, leaping off and knocking up enemy champions upon landing.

abilities.name: The Hextech Ultimatum
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Camille dashes to target champion, anchoring them to the area, and knocking away other enemies.

abilities.name: HEXTECH MUNITIONS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: A percentage of Corki's basic attack damage is converted into magic damage. Corki can occasionally retrieve The Package inside his base, granting him movement speed and an empowered cast of Valkyrie.

abilities.name: PHOSPHORUS BOMB
abilities.desc: Corki fires a flash bomb at a target location, dealing magic damage to enemies in the area. This attack additionally reveals units in the area for a duration.

abilities.name: VALKYRIE
abilities.desc: Corki flies a short distance, dropping bombs that create a trail of fire that damages opponents who remain in it. Special Delivery: If Corki has The Package, the flight is longer, enemies are knocked aside and the zone slows and deals damage.

abilities.name: GATLING GUN
abilities.desc: Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone towards his current target, dealing damage and reducing enemy Armor and Magic Resist.

abilities.name: MISSILE BARRAGE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Corki fires a missile toward his target location that explodes on impact, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Corki stores missiles over time, up to a maximum. Every third missile fired will be a Big One, dealing extra damage.

abilities.name: HEMORRHAGE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Darius's attacks and damaging abilities cause enemies to bleed for physical damage over time, stacking up to a cap. Upon reaching full stacks, Darius gains Noxian Might for a few seconds, gaining Attack Damage and applying full stacks of Hemorrhage instead of 1.

abilities.name: DECIMATE
abilities.desc: Darius winds up and swings his axe in a wide circle. Enemies struck by the blade take more damage than those struck by the handle. Darius heals based on enemy champions hit by the blade, and applies Hemorrhage.

abilities.name: CRIPPLING STRIKE
abilities.desc: Darius empowers his next attack to deal additional damage with a large slow.

abilities.name: APPREHEND
abilities.desc: Darius hones his axe, passively causing his physical damage to ignore a percentage of his target's Armor. When activated, Darius sweeps up his enemies with his axe's hook and pulls them to him.

abilities.name: NOXIAN GUILLOTINE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Darius leaps to an enemy champion and strikes a lethal blow, dealing true damage. This damage is increased for each stack of Hemorrhage on the target. If Noxian Guillotine is a killing blow, its cooldown is refreshed, granting Noxian Might and causing nearby minions and monsters to flee.

abilities.name: MOONSILVER BLADE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every third strike cleaves nearby enemies for an additional magic damage. After using an ability, Diana gains attack speed for her next 3 attacks.

abilities.name: CRESCENT STRIKE
abilities.desc: Unleashes a bolt of lunar energy in an arc dealing magic damage, and applying Moonlight.

abilities.name: PALE CASCADE
abilities.desc: Diana creates three orbiting spheres that detonate on contact with enemies to deal damage in an area. She also gains a temporary shield that absorbs damage. If her third sphere detonates, the shield gains additional strength.

abilities.name: LUNAR RUSH
abilities.desc: Diana dashes to an enemy and deals magic damage. Lunar Rush has no cooldown when used to dash to an enemy afflicted with Moonlight, removing Moonlight in an area.

abilities.name: MOONFALL
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Diana summons the moon in an area, slowing enemies nearby and applying Moonlight in a growing area. Releasing the button slams the moon down, spiraling enemies toward her and dealing damage scaling with the charge time.

abilities.name: GOES WHERE HE PLEASES
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Dr. Mundo resists the first Immobilizing effect that hits him, instead losing Health and dropping a chemical cannister nearby. Dr. Mundo can pick it up by walking over it, restoring Health and reducing this Ability's Cooldown. Dr. Mundo also has significantly increased Health regeneration.

abilities.name: INFECTED BONESAW
abilities.desc: Dr. Mundo throws an infected bonesaw, dealing damage to the first enemy hit based on their current health and slowing them.

abilities.name: HEART ZAPPER
abilities.desc: Dr. Mundo electrocutes himself, dealing persistent damage to nearby enemies and storing a portion of damage he takes. At the end of the duration or on Recast, Dr. Mundo deals a burst of damage to nearby enemies. If the burst hit an enemy, he heals a percentage of the stored damage.

abilities.name: BLUNT FORCE TRAUMA
abilities.desc: Passive - Dr. Mundo gains bonus Attack Damage, increasing based on his missing Health. Active - Dr. Mundo slams his “medical” bag into an enemy, dealing additional damage based on his missing Health. If the enemy dies they are swatted away, dealing damage to enemies they pass through.

abilities.name: MAXIMUM DOSAGE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Dr. Mundo pumps himself with chemicals, instantly healing a percent of his missing Health. He then gains bonus Attack Damage and Move Speed, and regenerates a portion of his maximum Health over a long duration.

abilities.name: LEAGUE OF DRAVEN
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Draven gains his fans' Adoration when he catches a Spinning Axe or kills a minion, monster, or tower. Killing enemy champions grants Draven bonus gold based on how much Adoration he has.

abilities.name: SPINNING AXE
abilities.desc: Draven's next attack will deal bonus physical damage. This axe will ricochet off the target high up into the air. If Draven catches it, he automatically readies another Spinning Axe. Draven can have two Spinning Axes at once.

abilities.name: BLOOD RUSH
abilities.desc: Draven gains increased Movement Speed and Attack Speed. The Movement Speed bonus decreases rapidly over its duration. Catching a Spinning Axe will refresh the cooldown of Blood Rush.

abilities.name: STAND ASIDE
abilities.desc: Draven throws his axes, dealing physical damage to targets hit and knocking them aside. Targets hit are slowed.

abilities.name: WHIRLING DEATH
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Draven hurls two massive axes to deal physical damage to each unit struck. Whirling Death slowly reverses direction and returns to Draven after striking an enemy champion. Draven may also activate this ability while the axes are in flight to cause it to return early. Deals less damage for each unit hit and resets when the axes reverse direction.

abilities.name: Z-DRIVE RESONANCE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every third attack or damaging spell on the same target deals bonus magic damage, and grants Ekko a burst of speed if the target is a champion.

abilities.name: TIMEWINDER
abilities.desc: Ekko throws a temporal grenade that expands into a time-distortion field upon hitting an enemy champion, slowing and damaging anyone caught inside. After a delay, the grenade rewinds back to Ekko, dealing damage on its return.

abilities.name: PARALLEL CONVERGENCE
abilities.desc: Ekko's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage to low health enemies. He can cast Parallel Convergence to split the timeline, creating an anomaly after a few seconds that slows enemies caught inside. If Ekko enters the anomaly, he gains shielding and stuns enemies by suspending them in time.

abilities.name: PHASE DIVE
abilities.desc: Ekko rolls evasively while charging up his Z-Drive. His next attack deals bonus damage and warps reality, teleporting him to his target.

abilities.name: CHRONOBREAK
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ekko shatters his timeline, becoming untargetable and rewinding to a more favorable point in time. He returns to whenever he was a few seconds ago, and heals for a percentage of the damage received in that duration. Enemies near his arrival zone take massive damage.

abilities.name: DEMON SHADE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When out of combat, Evelynn enters Demon Shade. Demon Shade heals Evelynn when she is low on health and grants Camouflage after level 5.

abilities.name: HATE SPIKE
abilities.desc: Evelynn strikes out with her lasher twice, dealing damage to the first unit hit. Then, Evelynn can re-cast to shoot another line of spikes at nearby foes.

abilities.name: ALLURE
abilities.desc: Evelynn curses her target, causing her next attack or spell after a delay to slow or charm her target, based on time cursed, and reduce their magic resist.

abilities.name: WHIPLASH
abilities.desc: Evelynn whips her target with her Lasher, dealing damage. She then gains movement speed for a short duration. When exiting Demon Shade, Whiplash pulls Evelynn to her target.

abilities.name: LAST CARESS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Evelynn briefly goes untargetable and decimates the area in front of her before warping backwards a long distance.

abilities.name: Rising Spell Force
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Ezreal gains increasing Attack Speed each time he successfully hits a spell, stacking up to 4 times.

abilities.name: Mystic Shot
abilities.desc: Ezreal fires a damaging bolt of energy which reduces all of his cooldowns slightly if it strikes an enemy unit.

abilities.name: Essence Flux
abilities.desc: Ezreal fires an orb that sticks to the first champion or objective hit. If Ezreal hits an enemy with the orb, it detonates and deals damage.

abilities.name: Arcane Shift
abilities.desc: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt which strikes the nearest enemy unit. Prioritizes enemies stuck with Essence Flux.

abilities.name: Trueshot Barrage
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ezreal winds up before firing a powerful barrage of energy that deals massive damage to each unit it passes through (damage is reduced for minions and non-epic monsters).

abilities.name: A HARMLESS SCARECROW
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When participating in a takedown Fiddlesticks leaves behind a movable scarecrow. The scarecrow will move toward the nearest enemy champion and explode when killed or after several seconds, causing fear.

abilities.name: TERRIFY
abilities.desc: Passive: When Fiddlesticks is out of combat for a longer time period and is invisible to enemy units, or has been stationary for a short period, its next skill will fear the target. Fiddlesticks launches a raven at a target, dealing magic damage and fear. The raven deals bonus damage if the unit has been terrified recently.

abilities.name: BOUNTIFUL HARVEST
abilities.desc: Fiddlesticks drains health from nearby enemies, dealing bonus execute damage at the end of the duration. During channeling, Fiddlestick is slowed and cannot cast any other abilities.

abilities.name: REAP
abilities.desc: Fiddlesticks slashes an area with its scythe, slowing all enemies hit and silencing enemies hit in the center of the slash.

abilities.name: CROWSTORM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: A murder of crows flock wildly around Fiddlesticks, dealing damage per second to all enemy units in the area.

abilities.name: Duelist's Dance
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Fiora challenges nearby enemy Champions to dodge her. She calls out a direction from which she will try to strike. If she can complete her own challenge, she receives a small bonus and calls out a new direction.

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.desc: Fiora lunges in a direction and stabs a nearby enemy, dealing physical damage and applying on-hit effects.

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.desc: Fiora parries all incoming damage and disables for a short time, then stabs in a direction. This stab slows the first enemy champion hit, or stuns them if Fiora blocked an immobilizing effect with this ability.

abilities.name: Bladework
abilities.desc: Fiora has increased attack speed for the next two attacks. The first attack slows the target, and the second attack will critically strike.

abilities.name: Grand Challenge
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Fiora reveals all four Vitals on an enemy champion and gains movement speed while near them. If Fiora hits all 4 Vitals or if the target dies after she has hit at least one, Fiora and her allies in the area are healed over the next few seconds.

abilities.name: SEASTONE TRIDENT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Fizz's attacks deal additional damage over time.

abilities.name: Urchin Strike
abilities.desc: Fizz dashes through his target, dealing magic damage and applying on hit effects.

abilities.name: RENDING WAVE
abilities.desc: Empowers Fizz' next attack to deal bonus damage, and killing a unit resets Rending Wave's cooldown. Additional attacks deal more damage.

abilities.name: Playful / Trickster
abilities.desc: Fizz hops into the air, landing gracefully upon his spear and becoming untargetable. From this position, Fizz can either slam the ground or choose to jump again before smashing back down.

abilities.name: Chum the Waters
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Fizz tosses a fish in a direction that attaches to any champion that touches it, slowing the target. After a short delay, a shark erupts from the ground, knocking up the target and knocking any nearby enemies aside. All enemies hit are dealt magic damage and slowed.

abilities.name: COLOSSAL SMASH
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every few seconds, Galio's next basic attack deals bonus magic damage in an area. Galio gains attack speed when Colossal Smash is up. When an ability hits an epic monster or enemy champion, it reduces the cooldown of Colossal Smash by 3 seconds. This effect can only be triggered once per cast.

abilities.name: WINDS OF WAR
abilities.desc: Galio fires two windblasts that converge into a large tornado that deals damage over time.

abilities.name: SHIELD OF DURAND
abilities.desc: Galio charges a defensive stance, moving slowly. Upon releasing the charge, Galio will taunt and damage nearby enemy champions.

abilities.name: JUSTICE PUNCH
abilities.desc: Galio will briefly step back and charge, damaging and knocking up the first enemy champion he encounters.

abilities.name: HERO'S ENTRANCE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Galio designates an ally's position as his landing spot, granting all allies in the area a magic shield. After a delay Galio smashes down location, knocking up nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Perseverance
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: If Garen has not recently been struck by damage or enemy abilities, he regenerates a percentage of his total health each second.

abilities.name: Decisive Strike
abilities.desc: Garen gains a burst of movement speed, breaking free of all slows affecting him. His next attack strikes a vital area of his foe, dealing bonus damage and silencing them.

abilities.name: Courage
abilities.desc: Garen reduces damage taken for a short time, and gains bonus resistance to crowd control.

abilities.name: Judgment
abilities.desc: Garen rapidly spins his sword around his body, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by the bladestorm's edge are critically struck.

abilities.name: Demacian Justice
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia to attempt to execute an enemy champion, dealing damage in an area around his target.

abilities.name: RAGE GENE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Gnar generates Rage when dealing and receiving damage. At maximum Rage his next ability will transform him into Mega Gnar, granting increased health, armor, magic resistance, and attack. Back in his Mini Gnar form he will still gain move speed and attack speed and range.

abilities.name: BOOMERANG THROW / BOULDER TOSS
abilities.desc: Gnar throws a boomerang that damages and slows enemies it hits before returning to him. If he catches the boomerang its cooldown is reduced. Mega Gnar instead throws a boulder that stops on the first unit hit, damaging and slowing everything nearby. It can then be picked up to reduce the cooldown.

abilities.name: HYPER / WALLOP
abilities.desc: Gnar's attacks and spells hype him up, dealing bonus damage and granting him Move Speed. Mega Gnar is too enraged to be hyper and instead can rear up on his hind legs and smash down on the area in front of him, stunning enemies in an area.

abilities.name: HOP / CRUNCH
abilities.desc: Gnar leaps to a location and bounces off the head of any unit he lands on, traveling further. Mega Gnar is too large to bounce and instead lands with earth-shattering force, dealing damage in an area around him.

abilities.name: GNAR!
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Mega Gnar throws everything around him in a chosen direction, dealing damage and slowing them. Any enemy that hits a wall is stunned and takes bonus damage.

abilities.name: Happy Hour
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Gragas periodically heals upon using an ability.

abilities.name: Barrel Roll
abilities.desc: Gragas rolls his cask to a location, which can be activated to explode or will explode on its own after 3 seconds. Enemies struck by the blast have their Movement Speed slowed.

abilities.name: Drunken Rage
abilities.desc: Gragas guzzles down brew from his cask for 1 second. After finishing, he becomes drunkenly empowered, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies on his next basic attack and reducing damage received.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.desc: Gragas charges to a location and collides with the first enemy unit he comes across, dealing damage to all nearby enemy units and stunning them.

abilities.name: Explosive Cask
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Gragas hurls his cask to a location, dealing damage and knocking back enemies caught in the blast radius.

abilities.name: New Destiny
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Graves' shotgun has some unique properties. He must reload when he runs out of ammo. Attacks fire 4 bullets, which cannot pass through units. Non-champions struck by multiple bullets are knocked back.

abilities.name: End of the Line
abilities.desc: Graves fires an explosive shell that detonates after 1.5 seconds, or 0.25 seconds if it strikes terrain.

abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.desc: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target area creating a cloud of smoke that reduces sight range. Enemies caught in the initial impact are dealt magic damage and have their movement speed reduced briefly.

abilities.name: Quickdraw
abilities.desc: Graves dashes forward gaining an Armor boost for several seconds. If Graves dashes towards an enemy champion, gain two stacks of True Grit instead. Hitting enemies with basic attacks lowers the cooldown of this skill and refreshes the resistance boost.

abilities.name: Collateral Damage
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Graves fires an explosive shell dealing heavy damage to the first champion it hits, and pushing Graves back from recoil. After hitting a champion or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes dealing damage in a cone.

abilities.name: THOUSAND CUTS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Gwen's attacks deal bonus magic damage based on the target's health. She heals for a portion of the damage dealt to champions by this effect.

abilities.name: SNIP SNIP!
abilities.desc: Gwen snips her scissors in a cone up to 6 times dealing magic damage. Gwen deals true damage to units in the center and applies her passive to them on each snip.

abilities.name: HALLOWED MIST
abilities.desc: Gwen summons mist that protects her from enemies outside of it. She can only be targeted by enemies who enter the mist.

abilities.name: SKIP 'N SLASH
abilities.desc: Gwen dashes a short distance then gains Attack Speed, attack range, and magic damage on-hit for a few seconds. If she hits an enemy during that time, this ability's cooldown is partially refunded.

abilities.name: NEEDLEWORK
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Gwen hurls a needle that slows enemies hit, deals magic damage, and applies A Thousand Cuts to champions hit. This ability can be cast up to two more times, with each cast throwing additional needles and dealing more damage.

abilities.name: WARPATH
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Hecarim gains Attack Damage equal to a percentage of his bonus Move Speed.

abilities.name: RAMPAGE
abilities.desc: Hecarim cleaves nearby enemies dealing physical damage. If Hecarim damages at least one enemy, he increases the damage and lowers the cooldown of subsequent Rampages.

abilities.name: SPIRIT OF DREAD
abilities.desc: Hecarim gains Armor and Magic Resist. Hecarim deals magic damage to nearby enemies, and gains Health equal to a percentage of any damage those enemies suffer.

abilities.name: DEVASTATING CHARGE
abilities.desc: Hecarim gains increasing Move Speed and can move through units for a short duration. His next attack knocks the target back and deals additional physical damage based on the distance he has traveled since activating the ability.

abilities.name: ONSLAUGHT OF SHADOWS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Hecarim summons spectral riders and charges forward, dealing magic damage in a line. Hecarim creates a shockwave when he finishes his charge, causing nearby enemies to flee in terror.

abilities.name: HEXTECH AFFINITY
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Gain Move Speed while near allied towers and turrets deployed by Heimerdinger.

abilities.name: H-28 G EVOLUTION TURRET
abilities.desc: Heimerdinger lays down a rapid-fire cannon turret equipped with a secondary pass-through beam attack (turrets deal half damage to towers).

abilities.name: HEXTECH MICRO-ROCKETS
abilities.desc: Heimerdinger fires long-range rockets that converge on his cursor.

abilities.name: CH-2 ELECTRON STORM GRENADE
abilities.desc: Heimerdinger fires long-range rockets that converge on his cursor.

abilities.name: UPGRADE!!!
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Heimerdinger invents an upgrade, causing his next spell to have increased effects.

abilities.name: IONIAN FERVOR
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When Irelia strikes enemies with spells she gains stacking bonus Attack Speed. At maximum stacks she also gains bonus damage on hit.

abilities.name: BLADESURGE
abilities.desc: Irelia dashes forward to strike her target, healing herself. If the target is Marked or dies to Bladesurge, its cooldown refreshes.

abilities.name: DEFIANT DANCE
abilities.desc: Irelia charges a strike that deals more damage as she charges. She takes reduced physical damage during the charge.

abilities.name: FLAWLESS DUET
abilities.desc: Irelia sends out two blades which converge on each other. Enemies caught in between are damaged, stunned and Marked.

abilities.name: VANGUARD'S EDGE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Irelia fires a massive number of blades that explode outward upon hitting an enemy champion. Enemies hit by the blades are damaged and Marked. Afterwards the blades form a wall that will damage and slow enemies that walk through it.

abilities.name: Tailwind
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Janna passively gains move speed and gives nearby allied champions the same bonus.

abilities.name: Howling Gale
abilities.desc: Janna summons a powerful whirlwind, dealing damage and knocking up enemies in its path.

abilities.name: Zephyr
abilities.desc: Janna gains move speed. The wind spirit affects the two closest champions in range, granting move speed to allies and damaging enemies.

abilities.name: Eye Of The Storm
abilities.desc: Janna conjures a defensive gale that shields herself, an ally, or a turret if one is in range. This shield also grants attack damage.

abilities.name: Monsoon
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Janna calls forth mighty winds of salvation, knocking back surrounding enemies and healing nearby allies.

abilities.name: Martial Cadence
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Jarvan's first basic attack on an enemy deals bonus physical damage based on their current Health. This effect cannot occur again on the same enemy for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Dragon Strike
abilities.desc: Jarvan IV extends his lance, dealing physical damage and lowering the Armor of enemies in its path. Additionally, this will pull Jarvan to his Demacian Standard, knocking up enemies in his path.

abilities.name: Golden Aegis
abilities.desc: Jarvan IV calls upon the ancient kings of Demacia to shield him from harm and slow surrounding enemies.

abilities.name: Demacian Standard
abilities.desc: Jarvan IV carries the pride of Demacia, passively granting him bonus Attack Speed. Activating Demacian Standard allows Jarvan IV to place a Demacian flag that deals magic damage on impact and grants Attack Speed to nearby allied champions. Cast again to automatically cast Dragon Strike to the flag.

abilities.name: Cataclysm
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Jarvan IV heroically leaps into battle at a target with such force that he terraforms the surrounding area to create an arena around them. Nearby enemies are damaged at the moment of impact.

abilities.name: Relentless Assault
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Jax's consecutive basic attacks continuously increase his Attack Speed.

abilities.name: Leap Strike
abilities.desc: Jax leaps toward a unit. If they are an enemy, he strikes them with his weapon.

abilities.name: Empower
abilities.desc: Jax charges his weapon with energy, causing his next attack to deal additional damage.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.desc: Jax's combat prowess allows him to dodge all incoming attacks for a short duration and then quickly counterattack, stunning all surrounding enemies.

abilities.name: Grandmaster's Might
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Every third consecutive attack deals additional Magic Damage. Additionally, Jax can activate this ability to strengthen his resolve, increasing his Armor and Magic Resist for a short duration.

abilities.name: HEXTECH CAPACITOR
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When Jayce swaps weapons he gains movement speed for a short duration.

abilities.name: TO THE SKIES! / SHOCK BLAST
abilities.desc: Hammer Stance: Leaps to an enemy dealing physical damage and slowing enemies. Cannon Stance: Fires an orb of electricity that detonates upon hitting an enemy (or reaching the end of its path) dealing physical damage to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: LIGHTNING FIELD / HYPER CHARGE
abilities.desc: Hammer Stance: Passive: Restores Mana per strike. Active: Creates a field of lightning damaging nearby enemies for several seconds. Cannon Stance: Gains a burst of energy, increasing Attack Speed to maximum for several attacks.

abilities.name: THUNDERING BLOW / ACCELERATION GATE
abilities.desc: Hammer Stance: Deals magic damage to an enemy and knocks them back a short distance. Cannon Stance: Deploys an Acceleration Gate increasing the Movement Speed of all allied champions who pass through it. If Shock Blast is fired through the gate the missile speed, range, and damage will increase.

abilities.name: MERCURY CANNON / MERCURY HAMMER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Hammer Stance: Transforms the Mercury Hammer into the Mercury Cannon gaining new abilities and increased range. The first attack in this form reduces the target's Armor and Magic Resist. Cannon Stance: Transforms the Mercury Cannon into the Mercury Hammer gaining new abilities and increasing Armor and Magic Resist. The first attack in this form deals additional magic damage.

abilities.name: Whisper
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Jhin's hand cannon, Whisper, is a precise instrument designed to deal superior damage. It fires at a fixed rate and carries only four shots. Jhin imbues the final bullet with dark magics to critically strike and deal bonus execute damage. Whenever Whisper crits, it inspires Jhin with a burst of movement speed.

abilities.name: Dancing Grenade
abilities.desc: Jhin launches a magical cartridge at an enemy. It can hit up to four targets and gains damage each time it kills.

abilities.name: Deadly Flourish
abilities.desc: Jhin fires a single shot with incredible range. It pierces through minions and monsters, but stops on the first champion hit. If the target was recently struck by Jhin's allies, lotus traps, or damaged by Jhin, they are rooted.

abilities.name: Captive Audience
abilities.desc: Jhin places an invisible lotus trap that blooms when walked over. It slows nearby enemies before dealing damage with an explosion of serrated petals. When Jhin kills an enemy champion, a lotus trap will bloom near where they were killed.

abilities.name: Curtain Call
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Jhin channels, transforming Whisper into a shoulder-mounted mega-cannon. It is able to fire 4 super shots at extreme range that pierce through minions and monsters, but stop on the first champion impacted. Whisper cripples enemies hit, which slows them and deals execute damage. The 4th shot is perfectly crafted, epically powerful, and guaranteed to critically strike.

abilities.name: Get Excited!
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Jinx receives massively increased Movement Speed and Attack Speed whenever she helps kill or destroy an enemy champions epic jungle monster, or structure.

abilities.name: Switcheroo!
abilities.desc: Jinx modifies her basic attacks by swapping between Pow-Pow, her minigun and Fishbones, her rocket launcher. Attacks with Pow-Pow grant Attack Speed, while attacks with Fishbones deal area of effect damage, gain increased range, and drain Mana.

abilities.name: Zap!
abilities.desc: Jinx uses Zapper, her shock pistol, to fire a blast that deals damage to the first enemy hit, slowing and revealing it.

abilities.name: Flame Chompers!
abilities.desc: Jinx throws out a line of snare grenades that explode after 5 seconds, lighting enemies on fire. Flame Chompers will bite enemy champions who walk over them, rooting them in place.

abilities.name: Super Mega Death Rocket!
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Jinx fires a super rocket across the map that gains damage as it travels. The rocket will explode upon colliding with an enemy champion, dealing damage to it and surrounding enemies based on their missing Health.

abilities.name: SECOND SKIN
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Kai'Sa's basic attacks stack Plasma, dealing increasing bonus magic damage. Allies' immobilizing effects help stack Plasma. Additionally, Kai'Sa's item purchases upgrade her basic spells to have more powerful properties.

abilities.name: ICATHIAN RAIN
abilities.desc: Kai'Sa shoots a swarm of missiles that seek out nearby targets. Living Weapon: Icathian Rain is upgraded to shoot more missiles.

abilities.name: VOID SEEKER
abilities.desc: Kai'Sa shoots a long range missile, revealing and marking enemies with her passive. Living Weapon: Void Seeker is upgraded to apply more Plasma marks and reduce cooldown on champion hit.

abilities.name: SUPERCHARGE
abilities.desc: Kai'Sa briefly increases her movement speed, then increases her attack speed. Living Weapon: Supercharge is upgraded to briefly grant Invisibility.

abilities.name: KILLER INSTINCT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Kai'Sa dashes near an enemy champion marked by Plasma and gains a temporary shield.

abilities.name: MARTIAL POISE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Enter a movement command while winding up Kalista's basic attack or Pierce to lunge a short distance when she launches her attack.

abilities.name: PIERCE
abilities.desc: Throw a fast moving spear that passes through enemies it kills.

abilities.name: SENTINEL
abilities.desc: Gain bonus damage when Kalista and her Oathsworn strike the same target. Activate to send a soul to scout out the path, revealing the area in front of it.

abilities.name: REND
abilities.desc: Attacks impale their targets with spears. Activate to rip the spears out, slowing and dealing escalating damage.

abilities.name: FATE'S CALL
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Kalista teleports the Oathsworn ally to herself. They gain the ability to dash toward a position, knocking enemy champions back.

abilities.name: MANTRA
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After using 3 abilities, Karma's next ability will be enhanced.

abilities.name: INNER FLAME
abilities.desc: Karma sends forth a ball of spirit energy that explodes and deals damage upon hitting an enemy unit. Mantra Bonus: In addition to the explosion, Mantra increases the destructive power of her Inner Flame, creating a cataclysm which deals damage after a short delay.

abilities.name: FOCUSED RESOLVE
abilities.desc: Karma creates a tether between herself and up to two targeted enemies dealing damage and revealing them. If the tethers are not broken, the enemies will be rooted and damaged again. Mantra Bonus: Karma creates an additional tether between the targets, dealing extra damage and extending the root duration. If only a single enemy is within range, a tether will spread from them to the next nearest enemy.

abilities.name: INSPIRE
abilities.desc: Karma summons a protective shield that absorbs incoming damage and increases the Move Speed of the protected ally. Mantra Bonus: Energy radiates out from her target, strengthening the initial shield and applying Inspire to nearby allied champions.

abilities.name: TRANSCENDENT EMBRACE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Karma forms a ring of spirit energy at a target location. After a brief delay, it detonates, dealing magic damage to all enemies inside and slowing them for a few seconds. If enemies are hit at the edge of the ring, they will be pulled in toward the center. Karma immediately enters the Mantra state.

abilities.name: VOID STONE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When Kassadin casts a spell near a visible enemy champion, he gains a magic shield.

abilities.name: NULL SPHERE
abilities.desc: Fires an orb that deals magic damage and silences the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: NETHER BLADE
abilities.desc: Empowers his next basic attack within to gain range and deal bonus magic damage and restore a percentage of missing mana on hit. If Nether Blade kills the target its remaining cooldown is reduced.

abilities.name: FORCE PULSE
abilities.desc: Deals magic damage to enemies in a cone and slows them. Force Pulse becomes enhanced after other spells are cast nearby, dealing increased magic damage and slowing instead.

abilities.name: RIFTWALK
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Blinks to target location and deals magic damage to nearby enemies. Casting Riftwalk causes the next Riftwalk within a certain amount of time to deal more damage and cost double the mana. (Up to 3 times)

abilities.name: VORACITY
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Whenever an enemy champion dies that Katarina has damaged recently, her remaining ability cooldowns are dramatically reduced. If Katarina picks up a Dagger, she uses it to slash through all nearby enemies, dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: BOUNCING BLADE
abilities.desc: Katarina throws a Dagger at the target that then bounces to nearby enemies before ricocheting onto the ground.

abilities.name: PREPARATION
abilities.desc: Katarina gains a burst of movement speed, tossing a Dagger into the air directly above herself.

abilities.name: SHUNPO
abilities.desc: Katarina blinks to a location near a Dagger or unit, dealing damage to the nearest enemy. Picking up a Dagger reduces Shunpo's cooldown.

abilities.name: DEATH LOTUS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Katarina becomes a flurry of blades, dealing damage over time and applying healing reduction. Katarina is able to slowly reposition for a short time.

abilities.name: DIVINE ASCENT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Kayle's attacks are empowered by the heavens as she levels up and spends skill points. Her wings are lit aflame as she progressively gains Attack Speed, Movement Speed, Attack Range, and waves of fire on her attacks.

abilities.name: RADIANT BLAST
abilities.desc: Kayle conjures a portal, summoning a celestial sword that pierces through enemies, slowing, damaging, and reducing the resistances of all hit.

abilities.name: CELESTIAL BLESSING
abilities.desc: Blessed by the divine, Kayle heals and grants movement speed to herself and the nearest ally.

abilities.name: STARFIRE SPELLBLADE
abilities.desc: Passive: Kayle's celestial sword, Virtue, deals bonus magic damage to enemies she attacks. Active: Kayle's next attack smites her target with celestial fire, dealing bonus damage proportionate to their missing health.

abilities.name: DIVINE JUDGMENT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Kayle makes an ally invulnerable and calls upon former Aspects of Justice to purify the area around her target with a holy rain of swords.

abilities.name: THE DARKIN SCYTHE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Kayn wields an ancient weapon and fights Rhaast, the darkin within it, for control. Either the Darkin will triumph, or Kayn will master Rhaast and become the Shadow Assassin. Darkin: Heal for a percentage of spell damage dealt to champions. Shadow Assassin: For the first few seconds in combat with enemy champions, deal bonus damage.

abilities.name: REAPING SLASH
abilities.desc: Kayn dashes, then slashes. Both deal damage.

abilities.name: BLADE'S REACH
abilities.desc: Kayn damages and slows targets in a line.

abilities.name: SHADOW STEP
abilities.desc: Kayn can walk through terrain.

abilities.name: UMBRAL TRESPASS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Kayn hides in an enemy's body, dealing massive damage when he bursts out.

abilities.name: MARK OF THE STORM
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Kennen stuns enemies he hits 3 times with his abilities.

abilities.name: THUNDERING SHURIKEN
abilities.desc: Throws a shuriken, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: ELECTRICAL SURGE
abilities.desc: Kennen passively deals extra damage and adds a Mark of the Storm to his target every few attacks, and he can activate this ability to damage and add another Mark of the Storm to targets who are already marked.

abilities.name: LIGHTNING RUSH
abilities.desc: Kennen morphs into a lightning form, becoming unable to attack. Kennen gains movement speed when entering this form, and attack speed when leaving it.

abilities.name: SLICING MAELSTROM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Kennen summons a storm that strikes at nearby enemy champions for magical damage.

abilities.name: UNSEEN THREAT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When the enemy team loses sight of Kha'Zix its next attack against enemy champions deals bonus magic damage and slows them briefly.

abilities.name: TASTE THEIR FEAR
abilities.desc: Kha'Zix causes physical damage by slashes with its claws dealing additional damage if the target is isolated. Evolved Reaper Claws: basic attacks and Taste Their Fear have increased range and if a target is isolated, meaning that they have no teammates or turrets nearby, then a significant portion of Taste Their Fear's cooldown is refunded.

abilities.name: VOID SPIKE
abilities.desc: Kha'Zix fires spikes to deal physical damage while also partially healing itself if it is within the explosion. Evolved Spike Racks: fires additional spikes revealing and slowing enemies for a short duration.

abilities.name: LEAP
abilities.desc: Kha'Zix leaps to a targeted area and deals physical damage. Evolved Wings: Leap gains significant range and the cooldown is refunded on champion takedowns.

abilities.name: VOID ASSAULT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Passive: each upgrade to Void Assault allows for Kha'Zix to evolve one of his abilities. Active: Kha'Zix becomes invisible and gains movement speed briefly. Evolved Adaptive Cloaking: invisibility duration lasts longer and can be cast multiple times.

abilities.name: MARK OF THE KINDRED
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Kindred can mark targets to Hunt. Successfully completing a Hunt permanently empowers Kindred's basic abilities. Every 4 hunts completed also increases Kindred's basic attack range.

abilities.name: DANCE OF ARROWS
abilities.desc: Kindred tumbles and shoots up to three arrows at nearby targets.

abilities.name: WOLF'S FRENZY
abilities.desc: Wolf enrages and attacks enemies around him. Lamb passively gains stacks by moving and attacking. When fully charged, Lamb's next attack restores health.

abilities.name: MOUNTING DREAD
abilities.desc: Lamb fires a carefully placed shot, slowing the target. If Lamb attacks the target two more times, her third attack instead directs Wolf to pounce on the enemy, savaging them for massive damage.

abilities.name: LAMB'S RESPITE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Lamb grants all living things inside a zone a respite from death. Until the effect ends, nothing can die. At the end, units are healed.

abilities.name: ICATHIAN SURPRISE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Upon death, Kog’Maw continues moving, gaining Move Speed for a brief time. After a short period Kog’Maw explodes, dealing True Damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: CAUSTIC SPITTLE
abilities.desc: Kog'Maw launches a corrosive projectile which deals Magic Damage and weakens the target's Armor and Magic Resist for a short time.

abilities.name: BIO-ARCANE BARRAGE
abilities.desc: Kog'Maw's basic attacks gain range and deal a percent of the target's maximum Health as Magic Damage.

abilities.name: VOID OOZE
abilities.desc: Kog'Maw launches ooze in target direction damaging all enemies it passes through and leaves a trail slowing enemies.

abilities.name: LIVING ARTILLERY
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Passive: Kog’Maw gains Attack Speed. Kog'Maw fires acid in area dealing Magic Damage to and revealing enemies hit. Damage is increased when targeting low Health enemies. Additionally, multiple Living Artilleries in a short period of time cause them to cost additional Mana.

abilities.name: DAUNTLESS INSTINCT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: K’Sante’s damage dealing abilities mark enemies to take more damage on his next hit. When All Out, K’Sante’s attacks, abilities, and passive deal more damage.

abilities.name: NTOFO STRIKES
abilities.desc: K’sante slams his weapon, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies in a line. On hit, grants a stack of Ntofo Strikes. At 2 stacks, K’Sante instead fires a shockwave that stuns and pulls enemies. When All Out, the cooldown is reduced.

abilities.name: PATH MAKER
abilities.desc: K’Sante charges up, gaining displacement immunity and reduced damage. He then dashes forward, dealing damage, knocking back and stunning enemies. When All Out, cooldown is refreshed, deals additional damage, no longer knocks back or stuns, but also grants increased damage reduction and dash speed.

abilities.name: FOOTWORK
abilities.desc: K’Sante dashes and gains a shield. If he dashes to an ally, the dash distance is increased and both gain a shield. When All Out, cooldown is reduced and dash speed is increased.

abilities.name: ALL OUT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: K’Sante becomes unstoppable and splits his ntofos to know back an enemy. If the enemy collides with terrain, they are knocked through, taking additional damage. K’Sante, then dashes behind them and enters All Out. While All Out, K’Sante’s abilities are upgraded. He also gains Attack Speed, Armor Penetration, and Omnivamp, while losing some maximum Health, Armor, and Magic Resist.

abilities.name: Flurry
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After Lee Sin uses an ability, his next 2 basic attacks gain Attack Speed and return Energy.

abilities.name: Sonic Wave / Resonating Strike
abilities.desc: Sonic Wave: Lee Sin projects a discordant wave of sound to locate his enemies, dealing physical damage to the first enemy it encounters. If Sonic Wave hits, Lee Sin can cast Resonating Strike for the next 3 seconds. Resonating Strike: Lee Sin dashes to the enemy hit by Sonic Wave, dealing physical damage based on the target's missing Health.

abilities.name: Safeguard / Iron Will
abilities.desc: Lee Sin rushes to target position, shielding himself from damage if an enemy champion or monster is near the landing point. After using Safeguard, Lee Sin can cast Iron Will for the next few seconds. Iron Will: Lee Sin's next attack deals bonus magic damage and has omnivamp.

abilities.name: Tempest / Cripple
abilities.desc: Tempest: Lee Sin smashes the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage and reveals enemy units hit. If Tempest hits an enemy, Lee Sin can cast cripple for the next 3 seconds. Cripple: Lee Sin cripples nearby enemies damaged by Tempest, reducing their Movement Speed for 4 seconds. Movement Speed recovers gradually over the duration.

abilities.name: Dragon's Rage
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Lee Sin performs a powerful roundhouse kick launching his target back, dealing physical damage to the target and any enemies they collide with. Enemies the target collides with are knocked into the air for a short duration.

abilities.name: SUNLIGHT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Damaging spells afflict enemies with Sunlight. When allied Champions deal damage to those targets, they consume the Sunlight to deal additional magic damage.

abilities.name: SHIELD OF DAYBREAK
abilities.desc: Leona uses her shield to perform her next basic attack, dealing bonus magic damage and stunning the target.

abilities.name: ECLIPSE
abilities.desc: Leona raises her shield to gain Armor, and Magic Resist. When the duration first ends, if there are nearby enemies, she will deal magic damage to them and prolong the duration of the effect.

abilities.name: ZENITH BLADE
abilities.desc: Leona projects a solar image of her sword, dealing magic damage to all enemies in a line. When the image fades, the last enemy champion struck will be briefly rooted and Leona will dash to them.

abilities.name: SOLAR FLARE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Leona calls down a beam of solar energy, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Enemies in the center of the area are stunned, while enemies on the outside are slowed.

abilities.name: DREAM-LADEN BOUGH
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Hitting a champion or monster with a skill will deal additional max Health damage over time.

abilities.name: BLOOMING BLOWS
abilities.desc: Passively, Lillia gains stacking Move Speed when hitting enemies with spells. She can activate this to deal magic damage to nearby enemies, dealing extra true damage on the edge.

abilities.name: WATCH OUT! EEP!
abilities.desc: Lillia deals damage in a nearby area, dealing heavy damage in the center.

abilities.name: SWIRLSEED
abilities.desc: Lillia hurls a seed that damages and slows those it lands on. If it doesn't hit anything, it will continue rolling until it hits a wall or target.

abilities.name: LILTING LULLABY
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Lillia causes all enemies with Dream Dust on them to become Drowsy before falling asleep. Those enemies will take extra damage on being forcibly woken up.

abilities.name: ICEBORN SUBJUGATION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When an enemy champion dies near Lissandra they become a Frozen Thrall. Frozen Thralls slow nearby enemies and then, after a delay, shatter from the intense cold, dealing magic damage to nearby targets.

abilities.name: ICE SHARD
abilities.desc: Throws a spear of ice that shatters when it hits an enemy, dealing magic damage and slowing Move Speed. Shards pass through the target, dealing the same damage to other enemies hit.

abilities.name: RING OF FROST
abilities.desc: Freezes nearby enemies in ice, dealing magic damage and rooting them.

abilities.name: GLACIAL PATH
abilities.desc: Lissandra creates an ice claw that deals magic damage. Reactivating this ability transports Lissandra to the claw's current location.

abilities.name: FROZEN TOMB
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: If cast on an enemy champion, the target is frozen solid, stunning it. If cast on Lissandra, she encases herself in dark ice, healing herself while becoming untargetable and invulnerable. Dark ice then emanates from the target dealing magic damage to enemies and slowing Move Speed.

abilities.name: LIGHTSLINGER
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Whenever Lucian uses an ability, his next attack becomes a double-shot.

abilities.name: PIERCING LIGHT
abilities.desc: Lucian shoots a bolt of piercing light through a target.

abilities.name: ARDENT BLAZE
abilities.desc: Lucian shoots a missile that explodes in a star shape, marking and briefly revealing enemies. Lucian gains Movement Speed for attacking marked enemies.

abilities.name: RELENTLESS PURSUIT
abilities.desc: Lucian quickly dashes a short distance. Lightslinger attacks reduce Relentless Pursuit's cooldown.

abilities.name: THE CULLING
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Lucian unleashes a torrent of shots from his weapons.

abilities.name: PIX, FAERIE COMPANION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Pix fires magical bolts of energy whenever the champion he's following attacks another enemy unit. These bolts are homing, but can be intercepted by other units.

abilities.name: GLITTERLANCE
abilities.desc: Pix and Lulu each fire a bolt of magical energy that heavily slows all enemies it hits.

abilities.name: WHIMSY
abilities.desc: If cast on an ally, grants them Attack Speed and Movement Speed for a short time. If cast on an enemy, turns them into an adorable critter that can't attack or cast spells.

abilities.name: HELP, PIX!
abilities.desc: If cast on an ally, commands Pix to jump to an ally and shield them. He then follows them and aids their attacks. If cast on an enemy, commands Pix to jump to an enemy and damage them. He then follows them and grants you vision of that enemy.

abilities.name: WILD GROWTH
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Lulu enlarges an ally (or herself), knocking nearby enemies into the air and granting the ally a large amount of bonus health. For the next few seconds, that ally gains an aura that slows nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Illumination
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Lux's damaging spells charge the target with energy for 5 seconds. Lux's next attack ignites the energy, dealing bonus magic damage (depending on Lux's level) to the target.

abilities.name: Light Binding
abilities.desc: Lux releases a sphere of light that binds and deals damage to up to two enemy units.

abilities.name: Prismatic Barrier
abilities.desc: Lux throws her wand and bends the light around any friendly target it touches, protecting them from enemy damage.

abilities.name: Lucent Singularity
abilities.desc: Fires an anomaly of twisted light to an area, which slows nearby enemies. Lux can detonate it to damage enemies in the area of effect.

abilities.name: Final Spark
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: After gathering energy, Lux fires a beam of light that deals damage to all targets in the area. In addition, triggers Lux's passive ability and refreshes the Illumination debuff duration.

abilities.name: Granite Shield
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Malphite is shielded by a layer of rock which absorbs damage up to 10% of his maximum Health. If Malphite has not been hit for 8 seconds, this effect recharges.

abilities.name: Seismic Shard
abilities.desc: Using his primal elemental magic, Malphite sends a shard of the earth through the ground at his foe, dealing damage upon impact and stealing Movement Speed for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Thunderclap
abilities.desc: Malphite passively gains armor. When Malphite activates Thunderclap, he attacks with such force that it creates a sonic boom. For the next few seconds, his attacks create aftershocks in front of him.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.desc: Malphite slams the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage based on his Armor as damage and reduces the Attack Speed of enemies for a short duration.

abilities.name: Unstoppable Force
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Malphite ferociously charges to a location, damaging enemies and knocking them into the air.

abilities.name: SAP MAGIC
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Maokai's basic attack also heals him and deals additional damage on a moderate cooldown. Each time Maokai casts a spell or is struck by an enemy's spell, this cooldown is reduced.

abilities.name: BRAMBLE SMASH
abilities.desc: Maokai knocks back nearby enemies with a shockwave, dealing magic damage and slowing them.

abilities.name: TWISTED ADVANCE
abilities.desc: Maokai contorts into a mass of moving roots, becoming untargetable and dashing to the target. Upon arrival, he roots the target.

abilities.name: SAPLING TOSS
abilities.desc: Maokai flings a sapling to the target area to stand guard. More effective in brush.

abilities.name: NATURE'S GRASP
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Maokai summons a colossal wall of brambles and thorns that slowly advances forwards, damaging and rooting any enemies in the path.

abilities.name: Double Strike
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every few consecutive basic attacks, Master Yi strikes twice.

abilities.name: Alpha Strike
abilities.desc: Master Yi teleports across the battlefield with blinding speed, dealing physical damage to multiple units in his path, while simultaneously becoming untargetable. Alpha Strike can critically strike and deals bonus physical damage to monsters. Basic attacks reduce Alpha Strike's cooldown.

abilities.name: Meditate
abilities.desc: Master Yi rejuvenates his body by focus of mind, restoring Health and taking reduced damage for a short time.

abilities.name: Wuju Style
abilities.desc: Grants bonus true damage on basic attacks.

abilities.name: Highlander
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Master Yi moves with unparalleled agility, temporarily increasing his Movement and Attack Speeds as well as making him immune to all slowing effects. While active, Champion kills or assists extend Highlander's duration. Passively reduces cooldown for his other abilities on a kill or assist.

abilities.name: SEARING BRILLIANCE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Whenever Mel uses an ability, she gains three bonus projectiles (up to nine maximum) on her next attack. When Mel deals damage through an ability or attack, she applies Overwhelm, which can stack infinitely. If the enemy is hit by Mel with enough Overwhelm damage, the stacks are consumed to execute the target.

abilities.name: RADIANT VOLLEY
abilities.desc: Mel fires a barrage of projectiles that explode around a target location, dealing damage repeatedly to enemies within the area.

abilities.name: REBUTTAL
abilities.desc: Mel forms a barrier around herself that reflects enemy projectiles back at the attacker, prevents her from taking damage, and grants her movement speed.

abilities.name: SOLAR SNARE
abilities.desc: Mel fires a radiant orb forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies within range, while rooting those at its center.

abilities.name: GOLDEN ECLIPSE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Mel strikes all enemies marked with Overwhelm regardless of their distance from her, dealing additional damage for each stack of Overwhelm. Ranks of Golden Eclipse increase Overwhelm's damage.

abilities.name: FIRED UP!
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Milio's abilities enchant allies on touch, making their next damage deal a burst of extra damage and burn the target.

abilities.name: ULTRA MEGA FIRE KICK
abilities.desc: Kick a ball that knocks back an enemy. The ball launches upward on hit and falls toward the enemy, damaging and slowing enemies in the area upon impact.

abilities.name: COZY CAMPFIRE
abilities.desc: Create an empowering zone that heals allies and increases attack range to those inside. The zone follows the ally nearest to the cast point.

abilities.name: WARM HUGS
abilities.desc: Milio tosses a shield to an ally, temporarily increasing their movement speed. This ability has 2 charges.

abilities.name: BREATH OF LIFE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Milio unleashes a wave of soothing flames that heal and remove crowd control effects from allies in range.

abilities.name: Love Tap
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Miss Fortune deals bonus physical damage whenever she basic attacks a new target.

abilities.name: Double Up
abilities.desc: Miss Fortune fires a bullet, damaging an enemy and critically striking a target behind them. Applies on-hit effects.

abilities.name: Strut
abilities.desc: Miss Fortune passively gains Movement Speed when not attacked. This ability can be activated to grant bonus Attack Speed for a short duration. While it's on cooldown, Love Taps reduce the remaining cooldown of Strut.

abilities.name: Make It Rain
abilities.desc: Miss Fortune reveals an area with a flurry of bullets, dealing waves of damage to opponents and slowing them.

abilities.name: Bullet Time
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Miss Fortune channels a barrage of bullets into a cone in front of her, dealing large amounts of damage to enemies. Each wave of Bullet Time can critically strike

abilities.name: DARKNESS RISE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Mordekaiser gains a powerful damage aura and Move Speed after landing 3 attacks or spells against champions or monsters.

abilities.name: OBLITERATE
abilities.desc: Mordekaiser smashes the ground with his mace dealing damage to each enemy struck. Damage is increased when hitting a single enemy.

abilities.name: INDESTRUCTIBLE
abilities.desc: Mordekaiser stores damage he deals and takes to create a shield. He may consume the shield to heal.

abilities.name: DEATH'S GRASP
abilities.desc: Mordekaiser pulls all enemies in an area.

abilities.name: REALM OF DEATH
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Mordekaiser drags his victim to a different dimension with him and steals a portion of their stats. If he kills them, he keeps the stats until the victim respawns.

abilities.name: SOUL SIPHON
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Morgana drains spirit from her enemies, healing as she deals damage to champions, large minions, and medium and larger jungler monsters.

abilities.name: DARK BINDING
abilities.desc: Morgana binds an enemy in place with dark magic, forcing them to feel the pain they've caused and dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: TORMENTED SHADOW
abilities.desc: Morgana casts a cursed shadow on an area, damaging enemies who dare stand in her dark circle. They receive magic damage over time, which increases the lower health they are.

abilities.name: BLACK SHIELD
abilities.desc: Morgana anoints an ally with a protective barrier of starfire, which absorbs magical damage and disabling effects until it is broken.

abilities.name: SOUL SHACKLES
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Morgana unleashes the full force of her Celestial power as she unbinds her wings and hovers above the ground. She lashes chains of dark pain onto nearby enemy champions, gaining Move Speed towards them. The chains slow and deal initial damage and, after a delay, stun those who are unable to break them.

abilities.name: Surging Tides
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When Nami's abilities hit allied champions they gain Movement Speed for a short duration.

abilities.name: Aqua Prison
abilities.desc: Sends a bubble to a target area, dealing damage and stunning all enemies on impact.

abilities.name: Ebb and Flow
