abilities.desc: Unleashes a stream of water that bounces back and forth between allied and enemy champions, healing allies and damaging enemies.

abilities.name: Tidecaller's Blessing
abilities.desc: Empowers an allied champion for a short duration. The ally's basic attacks and spells deal bonus magic damage and slow the target.

abilities.name: Tidal Wave
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Summons a massive Tidal Wave that knocks up, slows, and damages enemies. Allies hit gain double the effect of Surging Tides.

abilities.name: Soul Eater
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Gains bonus physical vamp.

abilities.name: Siphoning Strike
abilities.desc: Nasus strikes his foe, dealing damage and increasing the power of his future Siphoning Strikes if he slays his target.

abilities.name: Wither
abilities.desc: Nasus ages an enemy champion, decelerating their Movement and Attack Speeds over time.

abilities.name: Spirit Fire
abilities.desc: Nasus unleashes a spirit flame at a location, dealing damage and reducing the Armor of enemies who stand on it.

abilities.name: Fury of the Sands
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Nasus unleashes a mighty sandstorm that batters nearby enemies. While the storm rages, he gains increased Health, Attack Range, damages nearby enemies, has a reduced cooldown on Siphoning Strike, and gains bonus Armor and Magic Resistance for the duration.

abilities.name: STAGGERING BLOW
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Nautilus' first Attack against a target deals increased physical damage and roots them briefly.

abilities.name: DREDGE LINE
abilities.desc: Nautilus hurls his anchor forward. Colliding with an enemy pulls them and Nautilus together, dealing magic damage. Colliding with terrain pulls Nautilus towards it.

abilities.name: TITAN'S WRATH
abilities.desc: Nautilus gains a temporary Shield. While it persists, his Attacks deal damage over time to his target and surrounding enemies.

abilities.name: RIPTIDE
abilities.desc: Nautilus creates three exploding waves around himself. Each explosion damages and slows enemies.

abilities.name: DEPTH CHARGE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Nautilus fires a shockwave into the earth that chases an opponent. This shockwave rips up the earth above it, knocking enemies into the air. When it reaches the opponent, the shockwave erupts, knocking his target into the air and stunning them.

abilities.name: PROWL
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Moving through brush increases Nidalee's Move Speed, increasing when moving towards an enemy. Hitting champions or monsters with Javelin Toss or Bushwhack triggers a Hunt, granting brief True Sight of them. During this time, Nidalee gains Move Speed (increased when moving towards the Hunted target) and her Takedown and Pounce are enhanced against them.

abilities.name: JAVELIN TOSS / TAKEDOWN
abilities.desc: In human form, Nidalee throws a javelin at her target dealing Magic Damage, that gains damage as it flies. In cougar form, her next attack will wound her target, dealing more damage the lower their health is.

abilities.name: BUSHWHACK / POUNCE
abilities.desc: In human form, Nidalee lays a stealthed trap, dealing Magic Damage and revealing its target when sprung. In cougar form, she leaps in a target location, dealing Magic Damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: PRIMAL SURGE / SWIPE
abilities.desc: In human form, Nidalee heals the target and imbues Attack Speed for a short duration. In cougar form, she claws in a target direction, dealing Magic Damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: ASPECT OF THE COUGAR
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Passive: While in Human Form, marking enemies as hunted will reset Aspect of the Cougar’s cooldown. Active: Nidalee transforms between cougar and human, gaining new abilities.

abilities.name: JOY UNENDING
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Nilah gains increased experience from last-hitting minions along with the ability to enhance and share nearby healing and shielding from her allies.

abilities.name: FORMLESS BLADE
abilities.desc: With a snap of her whip-blade, Nilah damages any enemies she hits in a straight line in her chosen direction. This action extends her attack range for a short duration.

abilities.name: JUBILANT VEIL
abilities.desc: Nilah envelops herself in mist, increasing her movement speed and allowing her to gracefully dodge all incoming attacks. Any allies she touches during the mist's duration will also gain this effect.

abilities.name: SLIPSTREAM
abilities.desc: Nilah enthusiastically dashes toward her target, dealing damage to any enemies she passes through on the way.

abilities.name: APOTHEOSIS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Twirling her whip-blade in joyful exuberance, Nilah deals damage to enemies around her before pulling them closer with her weapon.

abilities.name: UMBRA BLADES
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every few seconds, Nocturne's next attack strikes surrounding enemies for bonus physical damage and heals himself. Nocturne's basic attacks reduce this cooldown.

abilities.name: DUSKBRINGER
abilities.desc: Nocturne throws a shadow blade that deals damage, leaves a Dusk Trail, and causes champions to leave a Dusk Trail. While on the trail, Nocturne can move through units and has increased Move Speed and Attack Damage.

abilities.name: SHROUD OF DARKNESS
abilities.desc: Nocturne empowers his blades, passively gaining Attack Speed. Activating Shroud of Darkness allows Nocturne to fade into the shadows, creating a magical barrier which blocks a single enemy ability and doubles his passive Attack Speed if successful.

abilities.name: UNSPEAKABLE HORROR
abilities.desc: Nocturne plants a nightmare into his target's mind, dealing damage each second and applying fear to the target if they do not get out of range by the end of the duration.

abilities.name: PARANOIA
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Nocturne reduces the sight radius of all enemy champions and removes their ally vision in the process. He can then launch himself at a nearby enemy champion.

abilities.name: BELOVED TRINKETS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Norra’s next ability leaves Trinkets on the battlefield. When an enemy touches a Trinket, it activates and fires a projectile at the triggering enemy. When Norra’s abilities hit enemy champions, the ability’s cooldown is reduced.

abilities.name: MEMORY SURGE
abilities.desc: Norra charges and fires a bolt of magical energy in target direction. She’s slowed while charging. The energy bolt stops upon hitting the first enemy champion, dealing magic damage to the target and nearby enemies. Enemies marked with Thread Sigils take bonus magic damage. At full charge, all Trinkets within the area are activated and the hit target is treated as Trinket-activated.

abilities.name: JOURNEY TO NOWHERE
abilities.desc: Norra reveals a mystical portal in a target circular area, dealing magic damage to all enemy champions within the area and banishing them to an alternate realm. Banished enemies are untargetable, slowed, and can’t cast.

abilities.name: THREADS OF HOMECOMING
abilities.desc: Passive: Damage dealing Trinkets apply a Thread Sigil to their targets. Norra summons portals on both sides of a target area. The portals fire magical threads between each other, dealing magic damage to all enemies in the area and applying Thread Sigils. Thread Sigils slow their targets and increase their collision size.

abilities.name: PORTALPALOOZA!
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Norra conjures a huge portal enveloping all units within the area. Magical projectiles will fire four times, dealing magic damage to all enemies along their path. The projectile direction is determined by swiping. The last projectile deals bonus damage.

abilities.name: CALL OF THE FRELJORD
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Nunu increases the attack speed and movement speed of Willump and a nearby ally, and causes Willump's basic attacks to damage enemies around the target.

abilities.name: CONSUME
abilities.desc: Willump takes a bite out of a minion, monster, or enemy champion, dealing damage and healing himself.

abilities.name: BIGGEST SNOWBALL EVER!
abilities.desc: Willump creates a snowball that grows in size and speed as he rolls it. The snowball damages and knocks up enemies.

abilities.name: SNOWBALL BARRAGE
abilities.desc: Nunu throws multiple snowballs that damage enemies. When he's finished, Willump roots any champions or large monsters that were hit by a snowball.

abilities.name: ABSOLUTE ZERO
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Nunu & Willump create a powerful blizzard in an area that slows enemies and deals massive damage at the end.

abilities.name: Berserker Rage
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Olaf's Attack Speed is increased by 1% for each 1% of his Health he is missing.

abilities.name: Undertow
abilities.desc: Olaf throws an axe into the ground at a target location, dealing damage to enemies it passes through and slowing their Movement Speed. If Olaf picks up the axe, the ability's cooldown is reduced by 4.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Vicious Strikes
abilities.desc: Olaf's Attack Speed is increased, he gains Physical Vamp and has increased healing from all sources based on how much Health he is missing.

abilities.name: Reckless Swing
abilities.desc: Olaf dashes to an enemy and attacks with such force that it deals true damage to his target. If the target does not die, Olaf takes true damage.

abilities.name: Ragnarok
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Olaf temporarily becomes immune to disables.

abilities.name: Clockwork Windup
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Orianna's Attacks deal additional magic damage. This damage increases the more Orianna Attacks the same target.

abilities.name: Command: Attack
abilities.desc: Orianna commands her Ball to fire toward a target location, dealing magic damage to targets along the way (deals less damage to subsequent targets). Her Ball remains at the target location after.

abilities.name: Command: Dissonance
abilities.desc: Orianna commands her Ball to release a pulse of energy, dealing magic damage around it. This leaves a field behind that speeds up allies and slows enemies.

abilities.name: Command: Protect
abilities.desc: Orianna commands her Ball to attach to an allied champion, Shielding them and dealing magic damage to any enemies it passes through on the way. Additionally, the Ball grants additional Armor and Magic Resist to the champion it is attached to.

abilities.name: Command: Shockwave
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Orianna commands her Ball to unleash a shockwave, dealing magic damage and launching nearby enemies towards the Ball after a short delay.

abilities.name: LIVING FORGE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Ornn gains additional bonus Armor and Magic Resistance from all sources. Ornn can spend gold to forge non-consumable items anywhere. Additionally, when Ornn reaches a certain level, forging items will grant a nearby ally the ability to buy one item from anywhere on the map. This will trigger every few levels.

abilities.name: VOLCANIC RUPTURE
abilities.desc: Ornn slams the ground, sending out a fissure dealing damage and slowing enemies hit. After a small delay, a magma pillar forms at the end location.

abilities.name: BELLOWS BREATH
abilities.desc: Ornn advances, breathing fire. Enemies hit by the final gout of flame become Brittle.

abilities.name: SEARING CHARGE
abilities.desc: Ornn charges, dealing damage to enemies he passes through. If Ornn collides with terrain while charging, the impact creates a shockwave around him which deals damage and knocks up enemies.

abilities.name: CALL OF THE FORGE GOD
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ornn summons a massive elemental at a location which travels toward him with increasing speed. Enemies run over by the elemental take damage, are slowed and are made Brittle. Ornn can recast the ability to charge into the elemental, redirecting it in the direction he hits it, causing the elemental to affect any enemies it runs over to be knocked up, dealing the same damage and re-applying Brittle.

abilities.name: MORTAL WILL
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every few spells or attacks, Pantheon's next spell is empowered.

abilities.name: COMET SPEAR
abilities.desc: Pantheon either thrusts his spear or throws his spear in the chosen direction. Low health enemies are critically hit. Mortal Will: Deals additional damage.

abilities.name: SHIELD VAULT
abilities.desc: Pantheon dashes to a target, damaging and stunning them. Mortal Will: Follows up with an additional attack that strikes 3 times.

abilities.name: AEGIS ASSAULT
abilities.desc: Pantheon sets his shield, becoming invulnerable to damage from the front and striking repeatedly with his spear. Mortal Will: Pantheon gains movement speed.

abilities.name: GRAND STARFALL
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Pantheon composes himself and then leaps into the air, landing at a chosen location as a comet, slowing and dealing damage in a line pointing to where he lands.

abilities.name: IRON AMBASSADOR
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Poppy throws her buckler that bounces off the target. Poppy can pick it up to gain a temporary shield.

abilities.name: HAMMER SHOCK
abilities.desc: Poppy swings her hammer, dealing damage and creating a zone that will slow enemies and explode after a delay.

abilities.name: STEADFAST PRESENCE
abilities.desc: Poppy passively gains Armor and Magic Resist. This bonus increases when she is low on Health. Poppy can activate Steadfast Presence to gain Move Speed and stop enemy dashes around her. If a dash is stopped, the enemy is slowed and grounded.

abilities.name: HEROIC CHARGE
abilities.desc: Poppy dashes to the target and pushes it back. If the target is pushed into a wall, it is stunned.

abilities.name: KEEPER'S VERDICT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Poppy channels a hammer strike that knocks enemies very far away.

abilities.name: GIFT OF THE DROWNED ONES
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When Pyke is hidden from enemies, he regenerates damage that he has recently taken from champions. Pyke also cannot gain extra Maximum Health from any source, and instead gains Bonus AD.

abilities.name: BONE SKEWER
abilities.desc: Pyke either stabs an enemy in front of him or pulls an enemy towards him.

abilities.name: GHOSTWATER DIVE
abilities.desc: Pyke enters Camouflage and gains significant movement speed that decays over time.

abilities.name: PHANTOM UNDERTOW
abilities.desc: Pyke dashes and leaves behind a phantom that will return to him, stunning enemy champions along its path.

abilities.name: DEATH FROM BELOW
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Pyke blinks to and executes low health enemies, allowing him to cast this spell again and granting additional gold to an ally who assists.

abilities.name: FEY FEATHERS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Rakan periodically gains a shield. Lover's Leap: Rakan can join Xayah's recall.

abilities.name: GLEAMING QUILL
abilities.desc: Flings a magical feather that deals magic damage. Striking a champion or epic monster enables Rakan to heal his allies.

abilities.name: GRAND ENTRANCE
abilities.desc: Dashes to a location, knocking up nearby enemies on arrival.

abilities.name: BATTLE DANCE
abilities.desc: Flies to an allied champion granting them a shield. Can be re-cast for free for a short duration. When cast on Xayah, the shield amount is doubled and the cooldown is reduced.

abilities.name: THE QUICKNESS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Gains movement speed, charming and dealing magic damage to enemies touched.

abilities.name: ROLLING ARMORDILLO
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Rammus starts rolling while out of combat, gaining movement speed. Entering battle will temporarily disable this effect.

abilities.name: POWERBALL
abilities.desc: Rammus accelerates in a ball towards his enemies, dealing damage and slowing targets affected by the impact.

abilities.name: DEFENSIVE BALL CURL
abilities.desc: Rammus goes into a defensive formation, vastly increasing his Armor and Magic Resistance, amplifying Spiked Shells' damage, and returning damage to enemies that basic attack him, but he is also slowed during this time.

abilities.name: FRENZYING TAUNT
abilities.desc: Rammus taunts an enemy champion or monster into a reckless assault against him. Additionally, he gains increased Attack Speed for a short time.

abilities.name: SOARING SLAM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Rammus hops into the air and slams down, dealing damage and creating aftershocks. Aftershocks slow enemies. The hopping distance increases based upon Powerball's current speed.

abilities.name: BREAK THE MOLD
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Rell's Basic Attacks and Abilities deal additional Magic Damage and steal Enemy Champion’s Armor and Magic Resist on hit. Refreshes on subsequent hits and stacks up to 5 times. Basic attacks deal Bonus Magic Damage.

abilities.name: SHATTERING STRIKE
abilities.desc: Rell throws her lance, dealing Magic Damage to enemies hit, breaking Enemy Shields and stunning them.

abilities.name: FERROMANCY: CRASHDOWN
abilities.desc: Mounted Passive: Rell gains Move Speed. Active: Rell dismounts, leaping towards target location, knocking enemies up and gains a Shield. Dismounted Passive: While dismounted, Rell gains Armor, Magic Resist, Attack Speed, and Attack Range, but is slowed. Active: Rell forms her Mount, gaining a burst of speed and her next basic attack knocks up enemies hit.

abilities.name: FULL TILT
abilities.desc: Rells grants herself and ally Move Speed, doubled toward enemies and each other. Her next Basic Attack or Shattering Strike explodes, dealing Magic Damage.

abilities.name: MAGNET STORM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Rell explodes in a magnetic fury, pulling nearby enemies toward herself. Rell continues pulling in nearby enemy champions, dealing Magic Damage.

abilities.name: REIGN OF ANGER
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Renekton's attacks generate Fury, increased when he is low on life. This Fury can empower his abilities with bonus effects.

abilities.name: CULL THE MEEK
abilities.desc: Renekton swings his blade, dealing moderate physical damage to all targets around him, and heals for a small portion of the damage dealt. If he has more than 50 Fury, his damage and heal are increased.

abilities.name: RUTHLESS PREDATOR
abilities.desc: Renekton slashes his target twice, dealing moderate physical damage and a stun. If Renekton has more than 50 Fury, he slashes his target three times, dealing high physical damage, and stunning for longer.

abilities.name: SLICE AND DICE
abilities.desc: Renekton dashes, dealing damage to units along the way. Empowered, Renekton deals bonus damage and reduces the Armor of units hit.

abilities.name: DOMINUS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Renekton transforms into the Tyrant form, gaining bonus Health and dealing damage to enemies around him. While in this form, Renekton gains Fury periodically.

abilities.name: UNSEEN PREDATOR
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Rengar leaps to his target when attacking if he is in the brush. Unique enemy champion takedowns grant him bonus Attack Damage. Casting basic abilities grants Rengar Ferocity which empowers his basic abilities. Casting empowered abilities briefly grants him bonus Movement Speed.

abilities.name: SAVAGERY
abilities.desc: Rengar's next couple of attacks gain Attack Speed. The first attack deals additional physical damage and Critically Strikes, with Critical Strike Chance further increasing the damage. Ferocity: Rengar gains even more Attack Speed and the first attack deals even more physical damage.

abilities.name: BATTLE ROAR
abilities.desc: Rengar damages nearby enemies and heals himself for some of the recent damage he has taken. Ferocity: Rengar deals more damage and removes all crowd control effects from himself.

abilities.name: BOLA STRIKE
abilities.desc: Rengar throws a bola, dealing physical damage and slowing the target struck. The bola also reveals the target and grants vision of the surrounding area. Ferocity: Rengar deals more damage and roots the target.

abilities.name: THRILL OF THE HUNT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Rengar gains movement speed and reveals the nearest enemy champion for a period of time. Shortly after casting Rengar becomes camoflauged with his next attack shredding the target's armor for a period of time.

abilities.name: RUNIC BLADE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Riven's abilities charge her blade, and her basic attacks expend charges to deal an additional damage.

abilities.name: BROKEN WINGS
abilities.desc: Riven lashes out in a series of strikes. This ability can be reactivated three times in a short time frame with the third hit knocking back nearby enemies.

abilities.name: KI BURST
abilities.desc: Riven emits a Ki Burst, damaging and stunning nearby enemies.

abilities.name: VALOR
abilities.desc: Riven steps forward a short distance and blocks incoming damage.

abilities.name: BLADE OF THE EXILE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Riven empowers her keepsake weapon with energy, and gains Attack Damage and Range. During this time, she also gains the ability to use Wind Slash, a powerful ranged attack, once. Taking down a target with her will extend the ability time and grant a re-cast of Wind Slash.

abilities.name: JUNKYARD TITAN
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every spell Rumble casts grants him Heat. When he reaches 50 Heat he enters the Danger Zone, granting all his basic abilities bonus effects. When he reaches 150 Heat, he starts Overheating, gaining bonus Attack Speed and granting his basic attacks bonus damage, but making him unable to cast spells for a few seconds.

abilities.name: FLAMESPITTER
abilities.desc: Rumble torches opponents in front of him, dealing magic damage in a cone for 3 seconds. While in Danger Zone this damage is increased.

abilities.name: SCRAP SHIELD
abilities.desc: Rumble pulls up a shield, protecting him from damage and granting him a quick burst of speed. While in Danger Zone, the shield strength and speed bonus is increased.

abilities.name: ELECTRO HARPOON
abilities.desc: Rumble launches a harpoon, electrocuting his target with magic damage, slowing their Move Speed, and reducing their Magic Resist. Rumble can carry 2 harpoons at a time. While in Danger Zone the damage and slow percentage is increased.

abilities.name: THE EQUALIZER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Rumble fires off a group of rockets, creating a wall of flames that damages and slows enemies.

abilities.name: ARCANE MASTERY
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Ryze's spells deal extra damage based on his Bonus Mana, and he gains a percentage increase to his maximum Mana based on his Ability Power.

abilities.name: OVERLOAD
abilities.desc: Passively, Ryze's other basic abilities reset the cooldown of Overload and charge a rune. When Ryze casts Overload with 2 runes charged, he gains a brief burst of Move Speed. On cast, Ryze throws a charge of pure energy in a line, dealing damage to the first enemy struck. If the target has Flux on it, Overload deals extra damage and bounces to nearby enemies with Flux.

abilities.name: RUNE PRISON
abilities.desc: Ryze traps a target in a cage of runes, damaging them and slowing their movement. If the target has Flux on it, they are instead rooted.

abilities.name: SPELL FLUX
abilities.desc: Ryze releases an orb of pure magical power that damages an enemy and debuffs all nearby enemies. Ryze's spells have additional effects against the debuffed enemy.

abilities.name: REALM WARP
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Passively, Overload deals even more damage against targets with Flux. On cast, Ryze creates a portal to a nearby location. After a few seconds, allies standing near the portal are teleported to the target location.

abilities.name: DAREDEVIL IMPULSE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Samira builds a combo by hitting attacks or abilities unique from the previous hit. Samira's attacks in melee range deal additional magic damage. Samira's attacks against enemies affected by Immobilizing effects will dash her to her attack range. If the enemy is Knocked Up, she also keeps them Knocked Up briefly.

abilities.name: FLAIR
abilities.desc: Samira fires a shot or swings her sword, dealing damage. If cast during Wild Rush, strike all enemies in her path upon completion.

abilities.name: BLADE WHIRL
abilities.desc: Samira slashes around her, damaging enemies and destroying enemy missiles.

abilities.name: WILD RUSH
abilities.desc: Samira dashes through an enemy (including structures), slashing enemies she passes through and gaining Attack Speed. Killing an enemy champion refreshes this ability's cooldown.

abilities.name: INFERNO TRIGGER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Samira unleashes a torrent of shots from her weapons, wildly shooting all enemies surrounding her.

abilities.name: ABSOLUTION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When units die near Senna, their souls are periodically trapped by the Black Mist. Senna can attack these souls to free them, absorbing the Mist that held them in death. Mist fuels her Relic Cannon's power with increased Attack Damage, Attack Range, and Critical Strike Chance. Attacks from Senna's Relic Cannon take longer to fire, deals bonus damage , and briefly grant her a portion of her target's Movement Speed.

abilities.name: PIERCING DARKNESS
abilities.desc: Piercing Darkness’s cast range matches Senna’s attack range and its cast time is improved with Attack Speed. It can target anything and applies on-hit effects to enemy champions.

abilities.name: LAST EMBRACE
abilities.desc: Senna sends forth a wave of Black Mist. If it hits an enemy it latches onto them hungrily, rooting them and everything nearby after a brief delay.

abilities.name: CURSE OF THE BLACK MIST
abilities.desc: Senna draws the Mist she has stored in her weapon into a storm around her, embracing darkness and becoming a wraith within. Allies who enter the area are camouflaged and also appear as wraiths as the Mist shrouds them. Wraiths gain increased movement speed, are unselectable, and hide their identities.

abilities.name: DAWNING SHADOW
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Senna calls upon the relic stones of fallen Sentinels, splitting her relic cannon into a holy array of shadow and light. She then fires a global beam that shields allies from harm, while damaging enemies caught in the center.

abilities.name: STAGE PRESENCE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every third ability cast will Echo, casting it again. Casting Seraphine's abilities grants a Note to nearby allies. For each Note, Seraphine's next basic attack gains Attack Range and bonus damage.

abilities.name: HIGH NOTE
abilities.desc: Seraphine deals damage in an area, increased by enemies' missing Health.

abilities.name: SURROUND SOUND
abilities.desc: Seraphine shields all nearly ally champions and grants them Movement Speed. If Seraphine is already shielded, nearby allies are healed, increasing for each ally.

abilities.name: BEAT DROP
abilities.desc: Seraphine deals damage and slows enemies. If the enemy is already slowed, they are rooted instead. If they are already rooted, they are stunned instead.

abilities.name: ENCORE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Seraphine deals damage in a line, charming and slowing enemies. Encore extends if it touches an ally or enemy champion.

abilities.name: PIT GRIT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Sett's basic attacks alternate between left and right punch. Right punch is slightly stronger and faster. Sett also hates losing, gaining additional health regeneration based off of his missing health.

abilities.name: KNUCKLE DOWN
abilities.desc: Sett's next two attacks deal additional damage based off of the target's max health. Sett also gains movement speed while moving towards enemy champions.

abilities.name: HAYMAKER
abilities.desc: Sett passively stores damage he takes as Grit. On cast, Sett expends all stored Grit to gain a shield and punch an area, dealing true damage in the center and physical damage on the sides.

abilities.name: FACEBREAKER
abilities.desc: Sett pulls in all enemies on opposite sides of him, dealing damage and stunning them. If enemies were only on one side, they are slowed instead of stunned.

abilities.name: THE SHOW STOPPER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Sett carries an enemy champion through the air and slams them into the ground, dealing damage and slowing all enemies near where they land.

abilities.name: KI BARRIER
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After casting a spell, Shen gets a shield. Affecting other champions reduces the cooldown of this effect.

abilities.name: TWILIGHT ASSAULT
abilities.desc: Shen recalls his spirit blade to attack with it, dealing damage based on the target's max health. The attacks are greatly empowered if it collides with an enemy champion, and all collided enemies are slowed while running away from Shen.

abilities.name: SPIRIT'S REFUGE
abilities.desc: Shen sends his spirit blade to an ally, creating a zone that blocks enemy attacks.

abilities.name: SHADOW DASH
abilities.desc: Shen dashes in a direction, taunting enemies in his path

abilities.name: STAND UNITED
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Shen shields target allied champion from incoming damage, and soon after teleports to their location.

abilities.name: Fury of the Dragonborn
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Shyvana gains stacks when slaying large and epic monsters, as well as champions. Dragons grant extra stacks. Every 100 stack enhances one of Shyvana's abilities.

abilities.name: Twin Bite
abilities.desc: Shyvana strikes twice on her next attack. Basic attacks reduce the cooldown of Twin Bite. Dragon Form: Twin Bite cleaves all units in front of Shyvana. Slaying Mountain Drake causes Twin Bite to slow enemies while in Dragon Form.

abilities.name: Burnout
abilities.desc: Shyvana surrounds herself in fire, dealing magic damage per second to nearby enemies and moving faster for 3 seconds. The Movement Speed reduces over the duration of the spell. Basic attacks extend the duration of Burnout. Dragon Form: Burnout grows in size. Slaying Cloud Drake gives Shyvana 25% extra Movement Speed while in Dragon Form.

abilities.name: Flame Breath
abilities.desc: Shyvana unleashes a fireball that deals damage to all enemies it encounters and leaves cinders on the target, marking them for 5 seconds. Shyvana's basic attacks on marked targets deal a percentage of their maximum Health as damage on-hit. Dragon Form: Flame Breath explodes on impact or at target location, dealing bonus damage and scorching the earth for a short duration. Slaying Infernal Drake converts damage dealt to marked enemies to true damage while in Dragon Form.

abilities.name: Dragon's Descent
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Shyvana transforms into a dragon and takes flight to a target location. Enemies along her path take damage and are knocked toward her target location. Shyvana passively gains Fury per second and gains 2 Fury on basic attack.

abilities.name: Noxious Slipstream
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Singed drafts off nearby champions, gaining a burst of movement speed when passing them.

abilities.name: Poison Trail
abilities.desc: Leaves a trail of poison behind Singed, dealing damage to enemies caught in the path.

abilities.name: Mega Adhesive
abilities.desc: Throws a vial of mega adhesive on the ground, slowing and grounding enemies who walk on it.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.desc: Damages target enemy unit and flings them into the air behind Singed. If the target Singed flings lands in his Mega Adhesive, they are also rooted.

abilities.name: Insanity Potion
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him increased combat stats.

abilities.name: GLORY IN DEATH
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After being killed, Sion will temporarily reanimate with rapidly decaying Health. His attacks become very rapid, heal him, and deal bonus damage based on his target's maximum Health.

abilities.name: DECIMATING SMASH
abilities.desc: Sion charges a powerful swing in an area in front of himself that will deal damage to enemies when released. If he charges for enough time, enemies hit by the swing will also be knocked up and stunned.

abilities.name: SOUL FURNACE
abilities.desc: Sion shields himself and can reactivate after 3 seconds to deal Magic Damage to enemies nearby. When Sion kills enemies, he passively gains maximum Health.

abilities.name: ROAR OF THE SLAYER
abilities.desc: Sion fires a short range shockwave that damages and slows and reduces the Armor of the first enemy hit. If the shockwave hits a minion or monster, it will be knocked back, damaging, slowing, and reducing the Armor of all enemies that it passes through.

abilities.name: UNSTOPPABLE ONSLAUGHT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Sion charges in a direction, ramping up speed over time. He can steer his charge slightly with the mouse cursor location. When he collides with an enemy he deals damage and knocks them up based on the distance he has charged.

abilities.name: FLEET OF FOOT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Sivir gains a short burst of Move Speed when she attacks an enemy champion.

abilities.name: BOOMERANG BLADE
abilities.desc: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing damage each way.

abilities.name: RICOCHET
abilities.desc: Sivir's next few basic attacks gain additional attack speed and bounce to nearby targets, dealing reduced damage while bouncing.

abilities.name: SPELL SHIELD
abilities.desc: Creates a magical barrier that blocks a single enemy ability cast on Sivir. She receives health and a burst of movement speed if a spell is blocked.

abilities.name: ON THE HUNT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Sivir leads her allies in battle, granting them a burst of move speed for a short time. In addition, her ability cooldowns are reduced. Sivir gains morale when damaging an enemy, granting a buff to allies and refreshing her ultimate at max morale.

abilities.name: THREADS OF VIBRATION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Skarner's Attacks, Shattered Earth, Upheaval, and Impale, apply Quaking. At max stacks of Quaking, enemies take max Health magic damage over its duration.

abilities.name: SHATTERED EARTH/UPHEAVAL
abilities.desc: Skarner rips a boulder from the earth that empowers his attacks and can be thrown as a powerful projectile.

abilities.name: SEISMIC BASTION
abilities.desc: Skarner gains a shield and creates an earthquake whose shockwave damages and slows foes.

abilities.name: IXTAL'S IMPACT
abilities.desc: Skarner charges forward and passes through terrain. If he collides with a champion or large monster, he'll slam them into the next wall he hits to damage and stun them.

abilities.name: IMPALE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Skarner's tails lash forward to damage and suppress enemy champions. Suppressed victims will be dragged along by Skarner as he moves around. If Skarner hits at least one champion, he gains Move Speed. If Shattered Earth is active, Skarner will first cast Upheaval.

abilities.name: DRAGON PRACTICE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Hitting champions with abilities and killing enemies with Super Scorcher Breath grants a stack of Dragon Practice. Stacks increase the damage of Smolder’s basic abilities.

abilities.name: SUPER SCORCHER BREATH
abilities.desc: Smolder breathes fire on an enemy, dealing both physical and magic damage. If the target is killed Smolder refunds mana. As he gains more stacks, this ability becomes more powerful. Passive: Level 1 stacks–ability deals damage to all enemies in the area. Level 2 stacks–ability triggers explosions behind the target. Level 3 stacks–abilitiy burns target for true damage, executing low-health enemy champions.

abilities.name: ACHOOO!
abilities.desc: Smolder lets out an adorable flaming sneeze that explodes when hitting enemy champions. Subsequent explosions deal smaller amounts of damage. Passive: the explosion deals bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: FLAP, FLAP, FLAP
abilities.desc: Smolder takes flight ignoring terrain and bombarding the lowest health enemy. In flight Smolder’s vision range is increased. Passive: deal bonus magic damage for each hit and gain extra bolts.

abilities.name: MMOOOMMMM!
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Smolder calls his mom to breathe fire from above, dealing extra damage and slowing enemies in the center of her fire. Getting hit by the fire himself, Smolder gains health.

abilities.name: Power Chord
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After 3 spell casts, Sona's next attack will deal bonus magic damage and stun the target.

abilities.name: Hymn of Valor
abilities.desc: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to two nearby enemies, prioritizing champions and monsters. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone bonus damage on their next attack against enemies.

abilities.name: Aria of Perseverance
abilities.desc: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, sending out protective melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone a temporary shield.

abilities.name: Song of Celerity
abilities.desc: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting nearby allies bonus Movement Speed. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allied champions tagged by the zone bonus Movement Speed.

abilities.name: Crescendo
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Passive: Sona’s halo strengthens, providing higher buffs. Sona’s ultimate chord advances slowly to the target point, dealing damage on its way. Every enemy hit for the first time is stunned.

abilities.name: Salvation
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Soraka runs faster towards nearby low health allies.

abilities.name: Starcall
abilities.desc: A star falls from the sky at the target location dealing magic damage and slowing enemies. If an enemy champion is hit by Starcall, Soraka is rejuvenated and recovers Health. After healing 3 ally champions, her next Starcall is empowered and deals more damage in a larger area.

abilities.name: Astral Infusion
abilities.desc: Soraka heals a friendly champion. Excess healing is converted into a shield.

abilities.name: Equinox
abilities.desc: Creates a zone at a location that damages and silences all enemies inside. When the zone expires, all enemies still inside are rooted.

abilities.name: Wish
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Soraka fills her allies with hope, instantly restoring health to herself and all friendly champions.

abilities.name: Ravenous Flock
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Swain's ravens collect Soul Fragments that heal him and permanently increase his maximum health and scaling with Ability Power.

abilities.name: Death's Hand
abilities.desc: Swain unleashes several bolts of eldritch power that pierce through enemies. Enemies hit take more damage for each bolt they are struck by.

abilities.name: Vision of Empire
abilities.desc: Swain opens a demon eye that deals damage and slows enemies. Champions hit are revealed and also grant Swain a Soul Fragment.

abilities.name: Nevermove
abilities.desc: Swain launches a wave of demonic power forward. It then returns to Swain and roots enemies it hits. Swain can then choose to pull all rooted champions closer.

abilities.name: Demonic Ascension
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Swain transforms into a demon and drains health from nearby enemy champions, minions, and neutral monsters. Swain can cast Demonflare to decimate multiple times and slow nearby enemies with a nova of soulfire. This form is indefinite as long as Swain drains enemy champions.

abilities.name: TRANSCENDENT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Syndra collects Splinters of Wrath by dealing ability damage to enemies and every time she levels up an ability. Splinters of Wrath can be used to upgrade her abilities and increase ability power.

abilities.name: DARK SPHERE
abilities.desc: Syndra conjures a Dark Sphere that deals magic damage where it appears. The sphere remains and can be manipulated by her other powers. Upgrade: Syndra gains an additional charge of Dark Sphere.

abilities.name: FORCE OF WILL
abilities.desc: Syndra hurls the nearest Dark Sphere at a target location, dealing magic damage and slowing the Move Speed of enemies within the area. Upgrade: Syndra deals bonus true damage.

abilities.name: SCATTER THE WEAK
abilities.desc: Syndra sends out a wave of force, dealing magic damage and knocking back enemies and Dark Spheres. Enemies hit by Dark Spheres are stunned and take additional damage. Upgrade: Syndra increases the range of the wave of force.

abilities.name: UNLEASHED POWER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Syndra launches the Dark Spheres orbiting her and any nearby at an enemy champion, dealing magic damage for each Sphere. Upgrade: The Dark Spheres execute enemies with low Health. When killing an enemy, the Spheres will explode on the spot and deal damage to nearby enemy champions.

abilities.name: ROCK SURFING
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When not in combat, Taliyah gains Move Speed near walls.

abilities.name: THREADED VOLLEY
abilities.desc: Taliyah throws a volley of rocks in a target direction, each rock dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and creating a quarry in the area around them. If Taliyah casts Threaded Volley in a quarry, she consumes the ground to throw a stronger boulder that damages and slows enemies.

abilities.name: SEISMIC SHOVE
abilities.desc: Taliyah causes an area of ground to erupt and throws enemies within it in a direction of her choosing.

abilities.name: UNRAVELED EARTH
abilities.desc: Taliyah creates a slowing minefield. If enemies dash through it or are knocked through it, the mines explode, damaging and slowing them.

abilities.name: WEAVER'S WALL
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Taliyah summons a massive wall. If she immediately casts it again, she steps on and surfs along it. The wall knocks back enemies. Once it’s fully formed, Taliyah can cast again to destroy it early.

abilities.name: BLADE'S END
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Talon's spells Wound champions and large monsters, stacking up to 3 times. When Talon attacks a champion with 3 stacks of Wound, they bleed for heavy damage over time.

abilities.name: NOXIAN DIPLOMACY
abilities.desc: Talon stabs the target unit. If they are within melee range, this attack deals critical damage. If they are outside melee range, Talon will leap at his target before stabbing them. Talon refunds some health and cooldown if this ability kills the target.

abilities.name: RAKE
abilities.desc: Talon sends out a volley of daggers that then return back to him, dealing physical damage every time it passes through an enemy. The returning blades deal bonus damage and slow units hit.

abilities.name: ASSASSIN'S PATH
abilities.desc: Talon vaults over any terrain or structure, up to a max distance. This ability has a low cooldown, but puts the used terrain on a long cooldown.

abilities.name: SHADOW ASSAULT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Talon disperses a ring of blades and becomes Invisible while gaining additional Move Speed. When Talon emerges from Invisibility, the blades converge on his location. Each time the blades move, Shadow Assault deals physical damage to enemies hit by at least one blade.

abilities.name: TOXIC SHOT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Teemo's attacks deal bonus magic damage over time.

abilities.name: BLINDING DART
abilities.desc: Teemo fires a dart that blinds its target, causing its attacks to deal no damage for a brief period.

abilities.name: MOVE QUICK
abilities.desc: Teemo scampers around, passively increasing his Movement Speed until he is struck by an enemy champion or turret. Activating Move Quick causes Teemo to roll forward a short distance, sprinting for a few seconds. During this time, Move Quick's passive speed is doubled, and cannot be removed by damage.

abilities.name: GUERILLA WARFARE
abilities.desc: After a delay, Teemo becomes camouflaged, unable to be seen unless near an enemy champion or turret. After exiting camouflage, Teemo gains Attack Speed.

abilities.name: NOXIOUS TRAP
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Teemo throws an explosive poisonous trap using one of the mushrooms stored in his pack. If an enemy steps on the trap, it will release a poisonous puddle, slowing enemies and damaging them over time. If Teemo throws a mushroom onto another mushroom it will bounce, gaining additional range.

abilities.name: DAMNATION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Thresh can harvest the souls of enemies that die near him, permanently granting him Armor and Ability Power.

abilities.name: DEATH SENTENCE
abilities.desc: Thresh binds an enemy in chains and pulls them toward him. Activating this ability a second time pulls Thresh to the enemy.

abilities.name: DARK PASSAGE
abilities.desc: Throws a Lantern to a target location. If an ally collects it Thresh will pull the ally to him.

abilities.name: FLAY
abilities.desc: Thresh's attacks wind up, dealing more damage the longer he waits between attacks. When activated, Thresh sweeps his chain, knocking all enemies hit in the direction of the blow.

abilities.name: THE BOX
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: A prison of walls that slow and deal damage if broken.

abilities.name: DRAW A BEAD
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Increases Tristana's range for her attacks, Explosive Charge, and Buster Shot as she levels.

abilities.name: RAPID FIRE
abilities.desc: Tristana increases her Attack Speed for a short time.

abilities.name: ROCKET JUMP
abilities.desc: Tristana fires at the ground to propel her to a distant location, dealing damage and slowing surrounding units for a brief period where she lands. Takedowns and fully stacked Explosive Charge detonations on champions reset Rocket Jump's cooldown.

abilities.name: EXPLOSIVE CHARGE
abilities.desc: When Tristana kills a unit, her cannonballs burst into shrapnel, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Can be activated to place a bomb on a target enemy or turret that explodes after a short duration dealing damage to surrounding units.

abilities.name: BUSTER SHOT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Tristana loads a massive cannonball into her weapon and fires it at an enemy unit. This deals Magic Damage and knocks the target back.

abilities.name: Battle Fury
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Tryndamere gains Fury for each attack, critical strike, and killing blow he makes. Fury passively increases his Critical Strike Chance and can be consumed with his Bloodlust spell.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.desc: Tryndamere thrives on the thrills of combat, increasing his Attack Damage as he is more and more wounded. He can cast Bloodlust to consume his Fury and heal himself.

abilities.name: Mocking Shout
abilities.desc: Tryndamere lets out an insulting cry, decreasing surrounding champions' Attack Damage. Enemies with their backs turned to Tryndamere also have their Movement Speed reduced.

abilities.name: Spinning Slash
abilities.desc: Tryndamere slices toward a target unit, dealing damage to enemies in his path.

abilities.name: Undying Rage
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he is unable to die, no matter how wounded he becomes.

abilities.name: Loaded Dice
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Upon killing a unit, Twisted Fate rolls his 'lucky' dice receiving bonus gold.

abilities.name: Wild Cards
abilities.desc: Twisted Fate throws three cards, dealing damage to each enemy unit they pass through.

abilities.name: Pick a Card
abilities.desc: Twisted Fate chooses a magic card from his deck, and uses that for his next attack, causing bonus effects. Red Cards deal damage in an area and slow, Blue Cards deal damage and restore mana, and Gold Cards deal damage and stun.

abilities.name: Stacked Deck
abilities.desc: Every 4 attacks, Twisted Fate deals bonus damage. Activating this skill increases his Attack Speed, and attacking enemy champions rolls his Loaded Dice.

abilities.name: Destiny
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Twisted Fate predicts the fortunes of his foes, revealing all enemy champions and enabling the use of Gate, which teleports Twisted Fate to any target location in 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: DEADLY VENOM
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Twitch's basic attacks infect the target, dealing true damage each second.

abilities.name: AMBUSH
abilities.desc: Twitch becomes Camouflaged for a short duration and gains Move Speed. When leaving Camouflage, Twitch gains Attack Speed for a short duration. When an enemy champion with Deadly Venom dies, Ambush's cooldown is reset.

abilities.name: VENOM CASK
abilities.desc: Twitch hurls a cask of venom that explodes in an area, slowing targets and applying deadly venom to the target.

abilities.name: CONTAMINATE
abilities.desc: Twitch wreaks further havoc on poisoned enemies with a blast of his vile diseases.

abilities.name: SPRAY AND PRAY
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Twitch unleashes the full power of his crossbow, shooting bolts over a great distance that pierce all enemies caught in their path.

abilities.name: ECHOING FLAMES
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Urgot's basic attacks and Purge periodically trigger blasts of flame from his legs, dealing physical damage.

abilities.name: CORROSIVE CHARGE
abilities.desc: Fires an explosive charge at the target location, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies caught in the explosion.

abilities.name: PURGE
abilities.desc: Urgot slows himself while he unloads his weapon on nearby enemies. Prioritizes enemy champions Urgot has recently struck with other abilities and triggers Echoing Flames.

abilities.name: DISDAIN
abilities.desc: Urgot charges in a direction, shielding himself and trampling non-champion enemies. If he catches an enemy champion, he will stop and hurl them out of his way.

abilities.name: FEAR BEYOND DEATH
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Urgot fires a chem-drill that impales the first enemy champion hit. If that champion falls below a health threshold, Urgot judges them weak and can execute them.

abilities.name: Living Vengeance
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: On kill or assist, Varus temporarily gains Attack Speed. This bonus is larger if the enemy is a champion.

abilities.name: Piercing Arrow
abilities.desc: Varus readies and then fires a powerful shot that gains extra range and damage the longer he spends preparing to fire.

abilities.name: Blighted Quiver
abilities.desc: Passive: Varus' basic attacks deal bonus magic damage and apply Blight. Varus' other abilities detonate Blight, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum Health. Active: Varus empowers his next Piercing Arrow.

abilities.name: Hail of Arrows
abilities.desc: Varus fires a hail of arrows that deal physical damage and desecrate the ground. Desecrated ground slows enemies' Movement Speed and reduces their self healing and regeneration.

abilities.name: Chain of Corruption
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Varus flings out a damaging tendril of corruption that immobilizes the first enemy champion hit and then spreads towards nearby uninfected champions, immobilizing them too on contact.

abilities.name: Night Hunter
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers, gaining 30 Move Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.

abilities.name: Tumble
abilities.desc: Vayne tumbles, maneuvering to carefully place her next shot. Her next attack deals bonus damage.

abilities.name: Silver Bolts
abilities.desc: Vayne tips her bolts with a rare metal, toxic to evil things. The third consecutive attack or ability against the same target deals a percentage of the target's max health as bonus true damage. Activating this ability gives Vayne bonus Attack Speed and she heals for some of Silver Bolts' damage.

abilities.name: Condemn
abilities.desc: Vayne draws a heavy crossbow from her back, and fires a huge bolt at her target, knocking them back and dealing damage. If they collide with terrain, they are impaled, dealing bonus damage and stunning them.

abilities.name: Final Hour
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Readying herself for an epic confrontation, Vayne gains increased Attack Damage, Invisibility during Tumble, and more bonus Movement Speed from Night Hunter. When an enemy champion damaged by Vayne dies within a few seconds, Final Hour's duration is extended.

abilities.name: PHENOMENAL EVIL POWER
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Veigar now gains passive stacks by hitting enemy champions once again.

abilities.name: BALEFUL STRIKE
abilities.desc: Veigar unleashes a bolt of dark energy that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit. Units killed by this bolt grant Veigar some ability power permanently.

abilities.name: DARK MATTER
abilities.desc: Veigar calls a great mass of dark matter to fall from the sky to the target location, dealing magic damage when it lands. Stacks of Phenomenal Evil reduce Dark Matter's cooldown.

abilities.name: EVENT HORIZON
abilities.desc: Veigar twists the edges of space, creating a cage that Stuns enemies that pass through.

abilities.name: PRIMORDIAL BURST
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Blasts target enemy champion, dealing a large amount of magic damage, increasing based on the target's missing health.

abilities.name: ORGANIC DECONSTRUCTION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Vel'Koz's abilities apply Organic Deconstruction to enemies on hit. If 3 stacks are accumulated, the enemy will take a burst of true damage.

abilities.name: PLASMA FISSION
abilities.desc: Vel'Koz shoots a bolt of plasma that splits in two on reactivation or upon hitting an enemy. The bolt slows and damages on hit.

abilities.name: VOID RIFT
abilities.desc: Vel'Koz opens a rift to the void that deals an initial burst of damage, then explodes for a second burst of damage after a delay.

abilities.name: TECTONIC DISRUPTION
abilities.desc: Vel'Koz causes an explosive anomaly at target location, knocking up enemies and knocking close enemies slightly away. The closer the anomaly is to Vel’Koz the stronger the knockback effect.

abilities.name: LIFE FORM DISINTEGRATION RAY
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Passive: Apply 3 Deconstruction stacks to an enemy champion marking them as Researched for 7 seconds. Active: Vel'Koz unleashes a channelled beam that he can steer in a target direction to deal magic damage and slow enemies hit. Researched enemy champions take true damage instead.

abilities.name: DOOM 'N GLOOM
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Vex periodically becomes empowered, causing her next basic Ability to fear enemies and interrupt dashes. Whenever a nearby enemy dashes, Vex applies a mark that can be consumed for bonus damage that also reduces the cooldown of her empowered state.

abilities.name: MISTRAL BOLT
abilities.desc: Launch a damaging missile that accelerates mid-flight.

abilities.name: PERSONAL SPACE
abilities.desc: Gain a shield and damage nearby enemies.

abilities.name: LOOMING DARKNESS
abilities.desc: Summon a damaging and slowing zone that applies Gloom to enemies.

abilities.name: SHADOW SURGE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Fire a missile that marks an enemy champion. Recast to dash to them and deal damage.

abilities.name: DENTING BLOWS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every third attack on the same enemy deals a percentage of their maximum Health, reduces their Armor, and grants Vi Attack Speed.

abilities.name: Vault Breaker
abilities.desc: Vi charges her gauntlets and unleashes a vault shattering punch, carrying her forward. Enemies she hits are knocked back and receive a stack of Denting Blows.

abilities.name: BLAST SHIELD
abilities.desc: Vi gains stacks of Blast Shield when hitting an enemy with an attack or ability. Activating Blast Shield generates a shield that absorbs damage. At maximum stacks, Vi also gains Movement Speed.

abilities.name: Excessive Force
abilities.desc: Vi's next attack blasts through her target, dealing damage to enemies behind it.

abilities.name: Assault and Battery
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Vi runs down an enemy, knocking aside anyone in the way. When she reaches her target she knocks it into the air, jumps after it, and slams it back into the ground.

abilities.name: SOVEREIGN'S DOMINATION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Enemies who fall before Viego become wraiths. By attacking a wraith, Viego temporarily seizes control of the dead enemy's body, healing for a percentage of his target's max health and gaining access to their basic abilities and items. He replaces their Ultimate with a free cast of his own.

abilities.name: BLADE OF THE RUINED KING
abilities.desc: Viego's spectral blade passively deals bonus percent current Health damage On-Hit and strikes twice vs. enemies he recently hit with an Ability, stealing Health. Viego can activate this Ability to thrust his zweihander forward, impaling enemies in front of him.

abilities.name: SPECTRAL MAW
abilities.desc: Viego charges up before dashing forward, releasing a ball of concentrated Black Mist that stuns the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: HARROWED PATH
abilities.desc: Viego commands the Black Mist to haunt and surround a piece of terrain. Viego can hide in the Mist as a wraith, gaining camouflage, Move Speed, and Attack Speed.

abilities.name: HEARTBREAKER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Viego teleports to a nearby location and executes an enemy champion on arrival, piercing their heart and causing a destructive shockwave around them that knocks away their allies.

abilities.name: GLORIOUS EVOLUTION
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Viktor can augment his basic abilities when he gets kills on enemies.

abilities.name: SIPHON POWER
abilities.desc: Viktor blasts an enemy unit dealing magic damage, gaining a shield and empowering his next basic attack. Augment: Siphon Power's shield is increased by 60% and Viktor gains bonus Move Speed after casting.

abilities.name: GRAVITY FIELD
abilities.desc: Viktor conjures a heavy gravitational field that slows enemies in its radius. Enemies who stay within the device for too long are stunned. Augment: Viktor's non-periodic spells apply a slow to enemies.

abilities.name: HEXTECH RAY
abilities.desc: Viktor uses his robotic arm to fire a chaos beam that cuts across the field in a line, dealing damage to all enemies in its path. Augment: An explosion follows the Death Ray's wake, dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: ARCANE STORM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Viktor conjures a singularity on the field which deals magic damage and interrupts enemy channels. The singularity then periodically does magic damage to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: CRIMSON PACT
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every 30 points of bonus Health gives Vladimir 1 Ability Power and every 1 point of Ability Power gives Vladimir 1.6 bonus Health (does not stack with itself).

abilities.name: TRANSFUSION
abilities.desc: Vladimir steals life from the target enemy. When Vladimir's resource is full, Transfusion will benefit from massively increased damage and healing for a brief time.

abilities.name: SANGUINE POOL
abilities.desc: Vladimir sinks into a pool of blood, becoming untargetable for 2 seconds. Additionally, enemies on the pool are slowed and Vladimir siphons life from them.

abilities.name: TIDES OF BLOOD
abilities.desc: Vladimir pays his own health to charge up a reservoir of blood which, when released, deals damage in the area around him but can be blocked by enemy units.

abilities.name: HEMOPLAGUE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Vladimir infects an area with a virulent plague. Affected enemies take increased damage for the duration. After a few seconds, Hemoplague deals magic damage to infected enemies and heals Vladimir for each enemy Champion hit.

abilities.name: THE RELENTLESS STORM
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Volibear's Attacks and abilities grant Attack Speed, and eventually cause his Attacks to deal bonus magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: THUNDERING SMASH
abilities.desc: Volibear gains speed towards enemies, Stunning and damaging the first one he Attacks.

abilities.name: FRENZIED MAUL
abilities.desc: Volibear damages an enemy, applying on-hit effects and gaining a mark. Casting this ability again on the same target consumes the mark to deal bonus damage and heal Volibear.

abilities.name: SKY SPLITTER
abilities.desc: Volibear summons a lightning bolt at a location, dealing damage and Slowing enemies while granting Volibear a shield if he's inside the blast radius.

abilities.name: STORMBRINGER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Volibear leaps to a target location, Slowing and damaging enemies beneath him while gaining bonus Health. Enemy towers near his landing location become temporarily disabled.

abilities.name: ETERNAL HUNGER
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Warwick's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage. If Warwick is below 50% health, he heals for the same amount.

abilities.name: JAWS OF THE BEAST
abilities.desc: Warwick lunges forward and bites his target, dealing damage based on their maximum health and healing for damage dealt.

abilities.name: BLOODHUNT
abilities.desc: Warwick senses enemies below 50% health, gaining Move Speed toward and Attack Speed against them. When they fall below 20% health, he frenzies and these bonuses triple.

abilities.name: PRIMAL HOWL
abilities.desc: Warwick gains damage reduction for 2.5 seconds. At the end, or if re-activated, he howls, causing nearby enemies to flee for 1 second.

abilities.name: INFINITE DURESS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Warwick leaps in a direction (scaling with his bonus Move Speed), suppressing the first champion he collides with for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: CRUSHING BLOWS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Wukong and his clones' attacks and abilities apply stacks of Crushing Blows. For each stack, Wukong and his clones deal increased damage to the target.

abilities.name: GOLDEN STAFF
abilities.desc: Passively gives Wukong's next attack bonus range after casting an ability. Wukong's next attack deals additional damage and heals him.

abilities.name: WARRIOR TRICKSTER
abilities.desc: Wukong becomes Invisible and dashes in a direction, leaving behind a clone that will attack enemies for reduced damage, mimicking Golden Staff and Cyclone.

abilities.name: NIMBUS STRIKE
abilities.desc: Wukong dashes to a targeted enemy and sends out images to attack enemies near his target, dealing damage to each enemy struck, and grants Wukong a temporary Attack Speed increase.

abilities.name: CYCLONE
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Wukong extends his staff and spins it around repeatedly, gaining Movement Speed. Enemies struck take damage and are knocked up. Cyclone can be recast within a short time window.

abilities.name: CLEAN CUTS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: After using an ability, Xayah's next basic attacks will hit all targets along their path and leave a Feather. Lover's Leap: Xayah can join Rakan's recall.

abilities.name: DOUBLE DAGGERS
abilities.desc: Xayah throws two damaging daggers that also drop Feathers she can recall.

abilities.name: DEADLY PLUMAGE
abilities.desc: Xayah creates a storm of blades that increase her basic attack speed and damage while granting her movement speed if she attacks a champion. If an ally Rakan is nearby, he also gains the effects of this ability.

abilities.name: BLADECALLER
abilities.desc: Xayah calls back all her dropped Feathers dealing damage and rooting enemies if hit with 3 or more.

abilities.name: FEATHERSTORM
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Xayah leaps into the air becoming untargetable and throwing out a fan of daggers, dropping Feathers she can recall.

abilities.name: Determination
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Every third attack deals bonus damage and heals Xin Zhao.

abilities.name: Three Talon Strike
abilities.desc: Xin Zhao's next 3 standard attacks deal increased damage with the third attack knocking an opponent into the air.

abilities.name: Wind Becomes Lightning
abilities.desc: Xin Zhao slashes in front of himself with his spear, then thrusts it forward, slowing affected enemies.

abilities.name: Audacious Charge
abilities.desc: Xin Zhao charges to an enemy, dealing damage to all enemies in the area and slowing them briefly.

abilities.name: Crescent Guard
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Xin Zhao deals damage to nearby enemies based on their current Health and knocks non-challenged targets back. Xin Zhao is impervious to damage dealt by champions outside of the circle created.

abilities.name: Way of the Wanderer
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Yasuo's Critical Strike Chance is doubled. Additionally, Yasuo builds toward a shield whenever he is moving. The shield triggers when he takes damage from a champion or monster.

abilities.name: Steel Tempest
abilities.desc: Thrusts forward, damaging all enemies in a line. On hit, grants a stack of Gathering Storm for a few seconds. At 2 stacks, Steel Tempest fires a whirlwind that knocks Airborne. Steel Tempest is treated as a basic attack and scales with all the same things.

abilities.name: Wind Wall
abilities.desc: Creates a moving wall that blocks all enemy projectiles for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Sweeping Blade
abilities.desc: Dashes through target enemy, dealing magic damage. Each cast increases your next dash's base Damage, up to a max amount. Cannot be re-cast on the same enemy for a few seconds. If Steel Tempest is cast while dashing, it will strike as a circle.

abilities.name: Last Breath
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Blinks to an Airborne enemy champion, dealing physical damage and holding all Airborne enemies in the area in the air. Grants maximum Flow but resets all stacks of Gathering Storm. For a moderate time afterwards, Yasuo's critical strikes gain significant Bonus Armor Penetration.

abilities.name: WAY OF THE HUNTER
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Yone deals magic damage with every second Attack. In addition, his critical strike chance is increased.

abilities.name: MORTAL STEEL
abilities.desc: Thrusts forward, damaging all enemies in a line. On hit, grants a stack of Gathering Storm for a few seconds. At 2 stacks, Mortal Steel causes Yone to dash forward with a gust of wind, knocking enemies Airborne. Mortal Steel is treated as a basic Attack and scales with all the same things.

abilities.name: SPIRIT CLEAVE
abilities.desc: Cleaves forward, damaging all enemies in a cone. Grants a shield to Yone. The shield's value is increased by the number of champions hit. Spirit Cleave's cooldown and cast time scale with Attack Speed.

abilities.name: SOUL UNBOUND
abilities.desc: Yone's spirit leaves his body behind, gaining Move Speed. When this skill ends, Yone's spirit is forced back to his body and he repeats a portion of the damage he dealt as a spirit.

abilities.name: FATE SEALED
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Yone blinks behind the last champion in a line with a slash so powerful it pulls all enemies hit towards him.

abilities.name: Feline Friendship
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Periodically, Yuumi’s Basic Attacks and Abilities will Shield Yuumi. If Yuumi is Attached to an ally or attaches within a few seconds they are Shielded for the same amount. While Attached to an ally, Yuumi grants them Friendship stacks when they kill enemy champions or minions. The ally with the highest Friendship stack becomes Yuumi’s Best Friend, which empowers her abilities towards them.

abilities.name: PROWLING PROJECTILE
abilities.desc: Yuumi fires a missile, dealing Magic Damage to the first target hit. It deals bonus damage and Slows if it takes at least 1 second to get to its target. While Attached, the missile can be controlled with your cursor. Best Friend Bonus: Applies Slow on hit, and when hitting an enemy champion, Yuumi’s Attached ally gains bonus Magic Damage toward them.

abilities.name: YOU AND ME!
abilities.desc: Passive: While Yuumi is Attached to her Best Friend, She gains bonus Healing and Shielding, and her Best Friend also receives additional Healing effects. Active: Yuumi dashes to a target ally, becoming untargetable from everything except turrets.

abilities.name: ZOOMIES
abilities.desc: Yuumi grants herself a Shield and gains Attack Speed. She also gains Move Speed while the Shield is active. If Yuumi is Attached, Zoomies affect her ally.

abilities.name: FINAL CHAPTER
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Yuumi launches five waves in the target direction. While Attached Yuumi can steer the direction of the waves. Detaching stops this bonus effect. Allied champions hit by the waves are Healed, with increased Healing for the Best Friend. Excess Healing converts into a Shield. Enemies struck by the waves take Magic Damage and are Slowed. The Slow stacks and refreshes on each hit.

abilities.name: Contempt for the Weak
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Zed's basic attacks against low health targets deals bonus Magic Damage. This effect can only occur once every few seconds on the same target.

abilities.name: Razor Shuriken
abilities.desc: Zed and his shadows throw their shurikens. Each shuriken deals damage to every enemy hit.

abilities.name: Living Shadow
abilities.desc: Passive: Zed gains energy whenever he and his shadows strike an enemy with the same ability. Energy can only be gained once per cast ability. Active: Zed's shadow dashes forward, remaining in place for a few seconds. Reactivating Living Shadow will cause Zed to switch positions with this shadow.

abilities.name: Shadow Slash
abilities.desc: Zed and his shadows slash, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Death Mark
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Zed becomes untargetable and dashes to an enemy champion, marking them. After a few seconds the mark triggers, repeating a portion of all the damage Zed dealt to the target while they were marked. Zed leaves a shadow behind and can reactive Death Mark to switch places with this shadow.

abilities.name: LIVING BATTERY
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Zeri gains Move Speed whenever she receives a shield. When she damages an enemy shield she absorbs its energy, shielding herself.

abilities.name: BURST FIRE
abilities.desc: Zeri fires a burst of rounds that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit. There is a cap on the Attack Speed and bonus Attack Speed will be converted into Attack Damage; when actively cast, a lightning bolt will be fired, dealing magic damage and a slow.

abilities.name: ULTRASHOCK LASER
abilities.desc: Zeri fires an electric pulse that slows and damages the first enemy hit. If the pulse hits a wall it expands into a long range laser.

abilities.name: SPARK SURGE
abilities.desc: Zeri dashes a short distance and energizes her next 3 shots of Burst Fire, causing them to pierce through enemies. She will vault and grind over any terrain she touches.

abilities.name: LIGHTNING CRASH
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Zeri discharges a nova of electricity and overcharges herself, gaining increased damage and stacking Move Speed that refreshes and gets stronger every time she hits an enemy champion. While overcharged, Burst fire becomes a faster triple shot that chains lightning between enemies.

abilities.name: Short Fuse
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: All of Ziggs’s abilities also damage structures. Periodically, his next ability deals bonus magic damage. This cooldown is reduced whenever Ziggs uses an ability.

abilities.name: Bouncing Bomb
abilities.desc: Ziggs throws a bouncing bomb that deals magic damage.

abilities.name: Satchel Charge
abilities.desc: Ziggs flings an explosive charge that detonates after 4 seconds, or when this ability is activated again. The explosion deals magic damage to enemies, knocking them away. Ziggs is also knocked away, but takes no damage. Ziggs can use the Satchel to hexplode vulnerable enemy turrets.

abilities.name: Hexplosive Minefield
abilities.desc: Ziggs scatters proximity mines that detonate on enemy contact, dealing magic damage and slowing. Successive mine detonations on the same target deal reduced damage.

abilities.name: Mega Inferno Bomb
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Ziggs deploys his ultimate creation, the Mega Inferno Bomb, hurling it an enormous distance. Enemies in the primary blast zone take more damage than those farther away. When quick casting, the bomb will target the enemy with the lowest HP.

abilities.name: TIME IN A BOTTLE
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Zilean stores time as Experience and can grant it to his allies. Zilean can impart this Experience on the nearest allied champion when he has enough to complete their next level up. Zilean receives as much Experience as he gives.

abilities.name: TIME BOMB
abilities.desc: Tosses a bomb to target area that sticks to units that come near it, prioritizing champions and units already carrying a bomb. When it detonates it deals magic damage to the target and nearby enemies. If a Time Bomb is detonated early by another Time Bomb, it also stuns enemies. The Time Bomb can be recharged 2 times.

abilities.name: TWISTED TIMEFLOW
abilities.desc: Makes time flow faster for himself, applying Fleeting Time to himself and gaining a damage absorbing shield. Zilean also grants Fleeting Time and identical shield to his nearest ally champion. Fleeting Time increases projectile speeds and grants move speed. Fleeting Time also increases Zilean’s ability haste.

abilities.name: TEMPORAL MIRAGE
abilities.desc: Creates a time-bending force field at target location. Within the force field enemy champions and projectiles are slowed.

abilities.name: CHRONOSHIFT
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Places a protective time rune on Zilean or an allied champion. If the rune bearer takes lethal damage during this time, they teleport back in time and become untargetable before they are revived and healed. If the rune bearer does not trigger the rune's revival effect, a part of Chronoshift's cooldown will be refunded.

abilities.name: MORE SPARKLES!
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: Zoe's next basic attack after casting a spell deals bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: PADDLE STAR!
abilities.desc: Zoe fires a missile that she can redirect in flight. Deals more damage the longer it flies in a straight line.

abilities.name: SPELL THIEF
abilities.desc: Zoe can pick up the remnants of enemy summoner spell and active item casts and cast them once herself. Whenever she casts a summoner spell, she gains 3 missiles that fire at the nearest target.

abilities.name: SLEEPY TROUBLE BUBBLE
abilities.desc: Causes the target to become drowsy, then fall asleep. The first source of damage that breaks the sleep is doubled, up to a cap.

abilities.name: PORTAL JUMP
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Blink to a nearby position for 1 second. Then blink back.

abilities.name: GARDEN OF THORNS
abilities.subtitle: PASSIVE
abilities.desc: When hitting enemies with Grasping Roots, Zyra spawns Thorn Spitters who fight for her. If it misses, a Thorn Spitter will spawn at the end of the root’s travel path instead. Thorn Spitters automatically attack Zyra’s target, dealing Magic Damage. Deadly Spines or Stranglethorns spawn additional Thorn Spitters for each extra enemy champion, large monster, or epic monster hit.

abilities.name: DEADLY SPINES
abilities.desc: Thick vines spread through the ground and explode into spines, dealing magic damage to enemies within the area. Zyra will also spawn a Thorn Spitter, dealing damage. For each enemy hit the number of Thorn Spitters will increase.

abilities.name: RAMPANT GROWTH
abilities.desc: Zyra enrages all Thorn Spitters near her. Enraged Thorn Spitters’ duration get reset and they gain bonus Health and bonus Attack Damage.

abilities.name: GRASPING ROOTS
abilities.desc: Zyra sends forth vines through the ground to ensnare her target, dealing Magic Damage and rooting enemies they come across. Zyra spawns a Thorn Spitter when the vines hit the first enemy, or after the skill is cast if no enemy is hit.

abilities.name: STRANGLETHORNS
abilities.subtitle: ULTIMATE
abilities.desc: Zyra summons a massive thicket at a target location, dealing Magic Damage to enemies as it expands and knocking them airborne as it contracts. When enemy champions are hit, a Thorn Spitter will spawn.
